the specific language governing permissions and\\n12: // limitations under the License.\\n13: \\n14: package main\\n15: \\n16: import (\\n17: \\t\\\"context\\\"\\n18: \\t\\\"encoding/json\\\"\\n19: \\t\\\"errors\\\"\\n20: \\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n21: \\t\\\"io\\\"\\n22: \\t\\\"math\\\"\\n23: \\t\\\"os\\\"\\n24: \\t\\\"path/filepath\\\"\\n25: \\t\\\"slices\\\"\\n26: \\t\\\"sort\\\"\\n27: \\t\\\"strconv\\\"\\n28: \\t\\\"strings\\\"\\n29: \\t\\\"time\\\"\\n30: \\n31: \\t\\\"github.com/google/go-cmp/cmp\\\"\\n32: \\t\\\"github.com/grafana/regexp\\\"\\n33: \\t\\\"github.com/nsf/jsondiff\\\"\\n34: \\t\\\"github.com/prometheus/common/model\\\"\\n35: \\t\\\"github.com/prometheus/common/promslog\\\"\\n36: \\t\\\"gopkg.in/yaml.v2\\\"\\n37: \\n38: \\t\\\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/histogram\\\"\\n39: \\t\\\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/model/labels\\\"\\n40: \\t\\\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql\\\"\\n41: \\t\\\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql/parser\\\"\\n42: \\t\\\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/promql/promqltest\\\"\\n43: \\t\\\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/rules\\\"\\n44: \\t\\\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/storage\\\"\\n45: \\t\\\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/junitxml\\\"\\n46: )\\n47: \\n48: // RulesUnitTest does unit testing of rules based on the unit testing files provided.\\n49: // More info about the file format can be found in the docs.\\n50: func RulesUnitTest(queryOpts promqltest.LazyLoaderOpts, runStrings []string, diffFlag, debug, ignoreUnknownFields bool, files ...string) int {\\n51: \\treturn RulesUnitTestResult(io.Discard, queryOpts, runStrings, diffFlag, debug, ignoreUnknownFields, files...)\\n52: }\\n53: \\n54: func RulesUnitTestResult(results io.Writer, queryOpts promqltest.LazyLoaderOpts, runStrings []string, diffFlag, debug, ignoreUnknownFields bool, files ...string) int {\\n55: \\tfailed := false\\n56: \\tjunit := &junitxml.JUnitXML{}\\n57: \\n58: \\tvar run *regexp.Regexp\\n59: \\tif runStrings != nil {\\n60: \\t\\trun = regexp.MustCompile(strings.Join(runStrings, \\\"|\\\"))\\n61: \\t}\\n62: \\n63: \\tfor _, f := range files {\\n64: \\t\\tif errs := ruleUnitTest(f, queryOpts, run, diffFlag, debug, ignoreUnknownFields, junit.Suite(f)); errs != nil {\\n65: \\t\\t\\tfmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, \\\"  FAILED:\\\")\\n66: \\t\\t\\tfor _, e := range errs {\\n67: \\t\\t\\t\\tfmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, e.Error())\\n68: \\t\\t\\t\\tfmt.Println()\\n69: \\t\\t\\t}\\n70: \\t\\t\\tfailed = true\\n71: \\t\\t} else {\\n72: \\t\\t\\tfmt.Println(\\\"  SUCCESS\\\")\\n73: \\t\\t}\\n74: \\t\\tfmt.Println()\\n75: \\t}\\n76: \\terr := junit.WriteXML(results)\\n77: \\tif err != nil {\\n78: \\t\\tfmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, \\\"failed to write JUnit XML: %s\\\\n\\\", err)\\n79: \\t}\\n80: \\tif failed {\\n81: \\t\\treturn failureExitCode\\n82: \\t}\\n83: \\treturn successExitCode\\n84: }\\n85: \\n86: func ruleUnitTest(filename string, queryOpts promqltest.LazyLoaderOpts, run *regexp.Regexp, diffFlag, debug, ignoreUnknownFields bool, ts *junitxml.TestSuite) []error {\\n87: \\tb, err := os.ReadFile(filename)\\n88: \\tif err != nil {\\n89: \\t\\tts.Abort(err)\\n90: \\t\\treturn []error{err}\\n91: \\t}\\n92: \\n93: \\tvar unitTestInp unitTestFile\\n94: \\tif err := yaml.UnmarshalStrict(b, &unitTestInp); err != nil {\\n95: \\t\\tts.Abort(err)\\n96: \\t\\treturn []error{err}\\n97: \\t}\\n98: \\tif err := resolveAndGlobFilepaths(filepath.Dir(filename), &unitTestInp); err != nil {\\n99: \\t\\tts.Abort(err)\\n100: \\t\\treturn []error{err}\\n101: \\t}\\n102: \\n103: \\tif unitTestInp.EvaluationInterval == 0 {\\n104: \\t\\tunitTestInp.EvaluationInterval = model.Duration(1 * time.Minute)\\n105: \\t}\\n106: \\n107: \\tevalInterval := time.Duration(unitTestInp.EvaluationInterval)\\n108: \\tts.Settime(time.Now().Format(\\\"2006-01-02T15:04:05\\\"))\\n109: \\t// Giving number for groups mentioned in the file for ordering.\\n110: \\t// Lower number group should be evaluated before higher number group.\\n111: \\tgroupOrderMap := make(map[string]int)\\n112: \\tfor i, gn := range unitTestInp.GroupEvalOrder {\\n113: \\t\\tif _, ok := groupOrderMap[gn]; ok {\\n114: \\t\\t\\terr := fmt.Errorf(\\\"group name repeated in evaluation order: %s\\\", gn)\\n115: \\t\\t\\tts.Abort(err)\\n116: \\t\\t\\treturn []error{err}\\n117: \\t\\t}\\n118: \\t\\tgroupOrderMap[gn] = i\\n119: \\t}\\n120: \\n121: \\t// Testing.\\n122: \\tvar errs []error\\n123: \\tfor i, t := range unitTestInp.Tests {\\n124: \\t\\tif !matchesRun(t.TestGroupName, run) {\\n125: \\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n126: \\t\\t}\\n127: \\t\\ttestname := t.TestGroupName\\n128: \\t\\tif testname == \\\"\\\" {\\n129: \\t\\t\\ttestname = fmt.Sprintf(\\\"unnamed#%d\\\", i)\\n130: \\t\\t}\\n131: \\t\\ttc := ts.Case(testname)\\n132: \\t\\tif t.Interval == 0 {\\n133: \\t\\t\\tt.Interval = unitTestInp.EvaluationInterval\\n134: \\t\\t}\\n135: \\t\\ters := t.test(testname, evalInterval, groupOrderMap, queryOpts, diffFlag, debug, ignoreUnknownFields, unitTestInp.FuzzyCompare, unitTestInp.RuleFiles...)\\n136: \\t\\tif ers != nil {\\n137: \\t\\t\\tfor _, e := range ers {\\n138: \\t\\t\\t\\ttc.Fail(e.Error())\\n139: \\t\\t\\t}\\n140: \\t\\t\\terrs = append(errs, ers...)\\n141: \\t\\t}\\n142: \\t}\\n143: \\n144: \\tif len(errs) > 0 {\\n145: \\t\\treturn errs\\n146: \\t}\\n147: \\treturn nil\\n148: }\\n149: \\n150: func matchesRun(name string, run *regexp.Regexp) bool {\\n151: \\tif run == nil {\\n152: \\t\\treturn true\\n153: \\t}\\n154: \\n155: \\treturn run.MatchString(name)\\n156: }\\n157: \\n158: // unitTestFile holds the contents of a single unit test file.\\n159: type unitTestFile struct {\\n160: \\tRuleFiles          []string       `yaml:\\\"rule_files\\\"`\\n161: \\tEvaluationInterval model.Duration `yaml:\\\"evaluation_interval,omitempty\\\"`\\n162: \\tGroupEvalOrder     []string       `yaml:\\\"group_eval_order\\\"`\\n163: \\tTests              []testGroup    `yaml:\\\"tests\\\"`\\n164: \\tFuzzyCompare       bool           `yaml:\\\"fuzzy_compare,omitempty\\\"`\\n165: }\\n166: \\n167: // resolveAndGlobFilepaths joins all relative paths in a configuration\\n168: // with a given base directory and replaces all globs with matching files.\\n169: func resolveAndGlobFilepaths(baseDir string, utf *unitTestFile) error {\\n170: \\tfor i, rf := range utf.RuleFiles {\\n171: \\t\\tif rf != \\\"\\\" && !filepath.IsAbs(rf) {\\n172: \\t\\t\\tutf.RuleFiles[i] = filepath.Join(baseDir, rf)\\n173: \\t\\t}\\n174: \\t}\\n175: \\n176: \\tvar globbedFiles []string\\n177: \\tfor _, rf := range utf.RuleFiles {\\n178: \\t\\tm, err := filepath.Glob(rf)\\n179: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n180: \\t\\t\\treturn err\\n181: \\t\\t}\\n182: \\t\\tif len(m) == 0 {\\n183: \\t\\t\\tfmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, \\\"  WARNING: no file match pattern\\\", rf)\\n184: \\t\\t}\\n185: \\t\\tglobbedFiles = append(globbedFiles, m...)\\n186: \\t}\\n187: \\tutf.RuleFiles = globbedFiles\\n188: \\treturn nil\\n189: }\\n190: \\n191: // testGroup is a group of input series and tests associated with it.\\n192: type testGroup struct {\\n193: \\tInterval        model.Duration   `yaml:\\\"interval\\\"`\\n194: \\tInputSeries     []series         `yaml:\\\"input_series\\\"`\\n195: \\tAlertRuleTests  []alertTestCase  `yaml:\\\"alert_rule_test,omitempty\\\"`\\n196: \\tPromqlExprTests []promqlTestCase `yaml:\\\"promql_expr_test,omitempty\\\"`\\n197: \\tExternalLabels  labels.Labels    `yaml:\\\"external_labels,omitempty\\\"`\\n198: \\tExternalURL     string           `yaml:\\\"external_url,omitempty\\\"`\\n199: \\tTestGroupName   string           `yaml:\\\"name,omitempty\\\"`\\n200: }\\n201: \\n202: // test performs the unit tests.\\n203: func (tg *testGroup) test(testname string, evalInterval time.Duration, groupOrderMap map[string]int, queryOpts promqltest.LazyLoaderOpts, diffFlag, debug, ignoreUnknownFields, fuzzyCompare bool, ruleFiles ...string) (outErr []error) {\\n204: \\tif debug {\\n205: \\t\\ttestStart := time.Now()\\n206: \\t\\tfmt.Printf(\\\"DEBUG: Starting test %s\\\\n\\\", testname)\\n207: \\t\\tdefer func() {\\n208: \\t\\t\\tfmt.Printf(\\\"DEBUG: Test %s finished, took %v\\\\n\\\", testname, time.Since(testStart))\\n209: \\t\\t}()\\n210: \\t}\\n211: \\t// Setup testing suite.\\n212: \\tsuite, err := promqltest.NewLazyLoader(tg.seriesLoadingString(), queryOpts)\\n213: \\tif err != nil {\\n214: \\t\\treturn []error{err}\\n215: \\t}\\n216: \\tdefer func() {\\n217: \\t\\terr := suite.Close()\\n218: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n219: \\t\\t\\toutErr = append(outErr, err)\\n220: \\t\\t}\\n221: \\t}()\\n222: \\tsuite.SubqueryInterval = evalInterval\\n223: \\n224: \\t// Load the rule files.\\n225: \\topts := &rules.ManagerOptions{\\n226: \\t\\tQueryFunc:  rules.EngineQueryFunc(suite.QueryEngine(), suite.Storage()),\\n227: \\t\\tAppendable: suite.Storage(),\\n228: \\t\\tContext:    context.Background(),\\n229: \\t\\tNotifyFunc: func(context.Context, string, ...*rules.Alert) {},\\n230: \\t\\tLogger:     promslog.NewNopLogger(),\\n231: \\t}\\n232: \\tm := rules.NewManager(opts)\\n233: \\tgroupsMap, ers := m.LoadGroups(time.Duration(tg.Interval), tg.ExternalLabels, tg.ExternalURL, nil, ignoreUnknownFields, ruleFiles...)\\n234: \\tif ers != nil {\\n235: \\t\\treturn ers\\n236: \\t}\\n237: \\tgroups := orderedGroups(groupsMap, groupOrderMap)\\n238: \\n239: \\t// Bounds for evaluating the rules.\\n240: \\tmint := time.Unix(0, 0).UTC()\\n241: \\tmaxt := mint.Add(tg.maxEvalTime())\\n242: \\n243: \\t// Optional floating point compare fuzzing.\\n244: \\tvar compareFloat64 cmp.Option = cmp.Options{}\\n245: \\tif fuzzyCompare {\\n246: \\t\\tcompareFloat64 = cmp.Comparer(func(x, y float64) bool {\\n247: \\t\\t\\treturn x == y || math.Nextafter(x, math.Inf(-1)) == y || math.Nextafter(x, math.Inf(1)) == y\\n248: \\t\\t})\\n249: \\t}\\n250: \\n251: \\t// Pre-processing some data for testing alerts.\\n252: \\t// All this preparation is so that we can test alerts as we evaluate the rules.\\n253: \\t// This avoids storing them in memory, as the number of evals might be high.\\n254: \\n255: \\t// All the `eval_time` for which we have unit tests for alerts.\\n256: \\talertEvalTimesMap := map[model.Duration]struct{}{}\\n257: \\t// Map of all the eval_time+alertname combination present in the unit tests.\\n258: \\talertsInTest := make(map[model.Duration]map[string]struct{})\\n259: \\t// Map of all the unit tests for given eval_time.\\n260: \\talertTests := make(map[model.Duration][]alertTestCase)\\n261: \\tfor _, alert := range tg.AlertRuleTests {\\n262: \\t\\tif alert.Alertname == \\\"\\\" {\\n263: \\t\\t\\tvar testGroupLog string\\n264: \\t\\t\\tif tg.TestGroupName != \\\"\\\" {\\n265: \\t\\t\\t\\ttestGroupLog = fmt.Sprintf(\\\" (in TestGroup %s)\\\", tg.TestGroupName)\\n266: \\t\\t\\t}\\n267: \\t\\t\\treturn []error{fmt.Errorf(\\\"an item under alert_rule_test misses required attribute alertname at eval_time %v%s\\\", alert.EvalTime, testGroupLog)}\\n268: \\t\\t}\\n269: \\t\\talertEvalTimesMap[alert.EvalTime] = struct{}{}\\n270: \\n271: \\t\\tif _, ok := alertsInTest[alert.EvalTime]; !ok {\\n272: \\t\\t\\talertsInTest[alert.EvalTime] = make(map[string]struct{})\\n273: \\t\\t}\\n274: \\t\\talertsInTest[alert.EvalTime][alert.Alertname] = struct{}{}\\n275: \\n276: \\t\\talertTests[alert.EvalTime] = append(alertTests[alert.EvalTime], alert)\\n277: \\t}\\n278: \\talertEvalTimes := make([]model.Duration, 0, len(alertEvalTimesMap))\\n279: \\tfor k := range alertEvalTimesMap {\\n280: \\t\\talertEvalTimes = append(alertEvalTimes, k)\\n281: \\t}\\n282: \\tslices.Sort(alertEvalTimes)\\n283: \\n284: \\t// Current index in alertEvalTimes what we are looking at.\\n285: \\tcurr := 0\\n286: \\n287: \\tfor _, g := range groups {\\n288: \\t\\tfor _, r := range g.Rules() {\\n289: \\t\\t\\tif alertRule, ok := r.(*rules.AlertingRule); ok {\\n290: \\t\\t\\t\\t// Mark alerting rules as restored, to ensure the ALERTS timeseries is\\n291: \\t\\t\\t\\t// created when they run.\\n292: \\t\\t\\t\\talertRule.SetRestored(true)\\n293: \\t\\t\\t}\\n294: \\t\\t}\\n295: \\t}\\n296: \\n297: \\tvar errs []error\\n298: \\tfor ts := mint; ts.Before(maxt) || ts.Equal(maxt); ts = ts.Add(evalInterval) {\\n299: \\t\\t// Collects the alerts asked for unit testing.\\n300: \\t\\tvar evalErrs []error\\n301: \\t\\tsuite.WithSamplesTill(ts, func(err error) {\\n302: \\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n303: \\t\\t\\t\\terrs = append(errs, err)\\n304: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n305: \\t\\t\\t}\\n306: \\t\\t\\tfor _, g := range groups {\\n307: \\t\\t\\t\\tg.Eval(suite.Context(), ts)\\n308: \\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, r := range g.Rules() {\\n309: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif r.LastError() != nil {\\n310: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tevalErrs = append(evalErrs, fmt.Errorf(\\\"    rule: %s, time: %s, err: %w\\\",\\n311: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tr.Name(), ts.Sub(time.Unix(0, 0).UTC()), r.LastError()))\\n312: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n313: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n314: \\t\\t\\t}\\n315: \\t\\t})\\n316: \\t\\terrs = append(errs, evalErrs...)\\n317: \\t\\t// Only end testing at this point if errors occurred evaluating above,\\n318: \\t\\t// rather than any test failures already collected in errs.\\n319: \\t\\tif len(evalErrs) > 0 {\\n320: \\t\\t\\treturn errs\\n321: \\t\\t}\\n322: \\n323: \\t\\tfor curr < len(alertEvalTimes) && ts.Sub(mint) <= time.Duration(alertEvalTimes[curr]) &&\\n324: \\t\\t\\ttime.Duration(alertEvalTimes[curr]) < ts.Add(evalInterval).Sub(mint) {\\n325: \\t\\t\\t// We need to check alerts for this time.\\n326: \\t\\t\\t// If 'ts <= `eval_time=alertEvalTimes[curr]` < ts+evalInterval'\\n327: \\t\\t\\t// then we compare alerts with the Eval at `ts`.\\n328: \\t\\t\\tt := alertEvalTimes[curr]\\n329: \\n330: \\t\\t\\tpresentAlerts := alertsInTest[t]\\n331: \\t\\t\\tgot := make(map[string]labelsAndAnnotations)\\n332: \\n333: \\t\\t\\t// Same Alert name can be present in multiple groups.\\n334: \\t\\t\\t// Hence we collect them all to check against expected alerts.\\n335: \\t\\t\\tfor _, g := range groups {\\n336: \\t\\t\\t\\tgrules := g.Rules()\\n337: \\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, r := range grules {\\n338: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tar, ok := r.(*rules.AlertingRule)\\n339: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif !ok {\\n340: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n341: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n342: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif _, ok := presentAlerts[ar.Name()]; !ok {\\n343: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n344: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n345: \\n346: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tvar alerts labelsAndAnnotations\\n347: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, a := range ar.ActiveAlerts() {\\n348: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif a.State == rules.StateFiring {\\n349: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\talerts = append(alerts, labelAndAnnotation{\\n350: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tLabels:      a.Labels.Copy(),\\n351: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAnnotations: a.Annotations.Copy(),\\n352: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t})\\n353: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n354: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n355: \\n356: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tgot[ar.Name()] = append(got[ar.Name()], alerts...)\\n357: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n358: \\t\\t\\t}\\n359: \\n360: \\t\\t\\tfor _, testcase := range alertTests[t] {\\n361: \\t\\t\\t\\t// Checking alerts.\\n362: \\t\\t\\t\\tgotAlerts := got[testcase.Alertname]\\n363: \\n364: \\t\\t\\t\\tvar expAlerts labelsAndAnnotations\\n365: \\t\\t\\t\\tfor _, a := range testcase.ExpAlerts {\\n366: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t// User gives only the labels from alerting rule, which doesn't\\n367: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t// include this label (added by Prometheus during Eval).\\n368: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif a.ExpLabels == nil {\\n369: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\ta.ExpLabels = make(map[string]string)\\n370: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n371: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\ta.ExpLabels[labels.AlertName] = testcase.Alertname\\n372: \\n373: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\texpAlerts = append(expAlerts, labelAndAnnotation{\\n374: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tLabels:      labels.FromMap(a.ExpLabels),\\n375: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAnnotations: labels.FromMap(a.ExpAnnotations),\\n376: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t})\\n377: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n378: \\n379: \\t\\t\\t\\tsort.Sort(gotAlerts)\\n380: \\t\\t\\t\\tsort.Sort(expAlerts)\\n381: \\n382: \\t\\t\\t\\tif !cmp.Equal(expAlerts, gotAlerts, cmp.Comparer(labels.Equal), compareFloat64) {\\n383: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tvar testName string\\n384: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif tg.TestGroupName != \\\"\\\" {\\n385: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\ttestName = fmt.Sprintf(\\\"    name: %s,\\\\n\\\", tg.TestGroupName)\\n386: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n387: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\texpString := indentLines(expAlerts.String(), \\\"            \\\")\\n388: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tgotString := indentLines(gotAlerts.String(), \\\"            \\\")\\n389: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif diffFlag {\\n390: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t// If empty, populates an empty value\\n391: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif gotAlerts.Len() == 0 {\\n392: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tgotAlerts = append(gotAlerts, labelAndAnnotation{\\n393: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tLabels:      labels.Labels{},\\n394: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAnnotations: labels.Labels{},\\n395: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t})\\n396: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n397: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t// If empty, populates an empty value\\n398: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif expAlerts.Len() == 0 {\\n399: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\texpAlerts = append(expAlerts, labelAndAnnotation{\\n400: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tLabels:      labels.Labels{},\\n401: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tAnnotations: labels.Labels{},\\n402: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t})\\n403: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n404: \\n405: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tdiffOpts := jsondiff.DefaultConsoleOptions()\\n406: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\texpAlertsJSON, err := json.Marshal(expAlerts)\\n407: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n408: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\\\"error marshaling expected %s alert: [%s]\\\", tg.TestGroupName, err.Error()))\\n409: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n410: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n411: \\n412: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tgotAlertsJSON, err := json.Marshal(gotAlerts)\\n413: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n414: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\\\"error marshaling received %s alert: [%s]\\\", tg.TestGroupName, err.Error()))\\n415: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n416: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n417: \\n418: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tres, diff := jsondiff.Compare(expAlertsJSON, gotAlertsJSON, &diffOpts)\\n419: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\tif res != jsondiff.FullMatch {\\n420: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\\\"%s    alertname: %s, time: %s, \\\\n        diff: %v\\\",\\n421: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\ttestName, testcase.Alertname, testcase.EvalTime.String(), indentLines(diff, \\\"            \\\")))\\n422: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n423: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t} else {\\n424: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\\\"%s    alertname: %s, time: %s, \\\\n        exp:%v, \\\\n        got:%v\\\",\\n425: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\ttestName, testcase.Alertname, testcase.EvalTime.String(), expString, gotString))\\n426: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n427: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n428: \\t\\t\\t}\\n429: \\n430: \\t\\t\\tcurr++\\n431: \\t\\t}\\n432: \\t}\\n433: \\n434: \\t// Checking promql expressions.\\n435: Outer:\\n436: \\tfor _, testCase := range tg.PromqlExprTests {\\n437: \\t\\tgot, err := query(suite.Context(), testCase.Expr, mint.Add(time.Duration(testCase.EvalTime)),\\n438: \\t\\t\\tsuite.QueryEngine(), suite.Queryable())\\n439: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n440: \\t\\t\\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\\\"    expr: %q, time: %s, err: %s\\\", testCase.Expr,\\n441: \\t\\t\\t\\ttestCase.EvalTime.String(), err.Error()))\\n442: \\t\\t\\tcontinue\\n443: \\t\\t}\\n444: \\n445: \\t\\tvar gotSamples []parsedSample\\n446: \\t\\tfor _, s := range got {\\n447: \\t\\t\\tgotSamples = append(gotSamples, parsedSample{\\n448: \\t\\t\\t\\tLabels:    s.Metric.Copy(),\\n449: \\t\\t\\t\\tValue:     s.F,\\n450: \\t\\t\\t\\tHistogram: promqltest.HistogramTestExpression(s.H),\\n451: \\t\\t\\t})\\n452: \\t\\t}\\n453: \\n454: \\t\\tvar expSamples []parsedSample\\n455: \\t\\tfor _, s := range testCase.ExpSamples {\\n456: \\t\\t\\tlb, err := parser.ParseMetric(s.Labels)\\n457: \\t\\t\\tvar hist *histogram.FloatHistogram\\n458: \\t\\t\\tif err == nil && s.Histogram != \\\"\\\" {\\n459: \\t\\t\\t\\t_, values, parseErr := parser.ParseSeriesDesc(\\\"{} \\\" + s.Histogram)\\n460: \\t\\t\\t\\tswitch {\\n461: \\t\\t\\t\\tcase parseErr != nil:\\n462: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\terr = parseErr\\n463: \\t\\t\\t\\tcase len(values) != 1:\\n464: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\terr = fmt.Errorf(\\\"expected 1 value, got %d\\\", len(values))\\n465: \\t\\t\\t\\tcase values[0].Histogram == nil:\\n466: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\terr = fmt.Errorf(\\\"expected histogram, got %v\\\", values[0])\\n467: \\t\\t\\t\\tdefault:\\n468: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\thist = values[0].Histogram\\n469: \\t\\t\\t\\t}\\n470: \\t\\t\\t}\\n471: \\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n472: \\t\\t\\t\\terr = fmt.Errorf(\\\"labels %q: %w\\\", s.Labels, err)\\n473: \\t\\t\\t\\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\\\"    expr: %q, time: %s, err: %w\\\", testCase.Expr,\\n474: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\ttestCase.EvalTime.String(), err))\\n475: \\t\\t\\t\\tcontinue Outer\\n476: \\t\\t\\t}\\n477: \\t\\t\\texpSamples = append(expSamples, parsedSample{\\n478: \\t\\t\\t\\tLabels:    lb,\\n479: \\t\\t\\t\\tValue:     s.Value,\\n480: \\t\\t\\t\\tHistogram: promqltest.HistogramTestExpression(hist),\\n481: \\t\\t\\t})\\n482: \\t\\t}\\n483: \\n484: \\t\\tsort.Slice(expSamples, func(i, j int) bool {\\n485: \\t\\t\\treturn labels.Compare(expSamples[i].Labels, expSamples[j].Labels) <= 0\\n486: \\t\\t})\\n487: \\t\\tsort.Slice(gotSamples, func(i, j int) bool {\\n488: \\t\\t\\treturn labels.Compare(gotSamples[i].Labels, gotSamples[j].Labels) <= 0\\n489: \\t\\t})\\n490: \\t\\tif !cmp.Equal(expSamples, gotSamples, cmp.Comparer(labels.Equal), compareFloat64) {\\n491: \\t\\t\\terrs = append(errs, fmt.Errorf(\\\"    expr: %q, time: %s,\\\\n        exp: %v\\\\n        got: %v\\\", testCase.Expr,\\n492: \\t\\t\\t\\ttestCase.EvalTime.String(), parsedSamplesString(expSamples), parsedSamplesString(gotSamples)))\\n493: \\t\\t}\\n494: \\t}\\n495: \\n496: \\tif debug {\\n497: \\t\\tts := tg.maxEvalTime()\\n498: \\t\\t// Potentially a test can be specified at a time with fractional seconds,\\n499: \\t\\t// which PromQL cannot represent, so round up to the next whole second.\\n500: \\t\\tts = (ts + time.Second).Truncate(time.Second)\\n501: \\t\\texpr := fmt.Sprintf(`{__name__=~\\\".+\\\"}[%v]`, ts)\\n502: \\t\\tq, err := suite.QueryEngine().NewInstantQuery(context.Background(), suite.Queryable(), nil, expr, mint.Add(ts))\\n503: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n504: \\t\\t\\tfmt.Printf(\\\"DEBUG: Failed querying, expr: %q, err: %v\\\\n\\\", expr, err)\\n505: \\t\\t\\treturn errs\\n506: \\t\\t}\\n507: \\t\\tres := q.Exec(suite.Context())\\n508: \\t\\tif res.Err != nil {\\n509: \\t\\t\\tfmt.Printf(\\\"DEBUG: Failed query exec, expr: %q, err: %v\\\\n\\\", expr, res.Err)\\n510: \\t\\t\\treturn errs\\n511: \\t\\t}\\n512: \\t\\tswitch v := res.Value.(type) {\\n513: \\t\\tcase promql.Matrix:\\n514: \\t\\t\\tfmt.Printf(\\\"DEBUG: Dump of all data (input_series and rules) at %v:\\\\n\\\", ts)\\n515: \\t\\t\\tfmt.Println(v.String())\\n516: \\t\\tdefault:\\n517: \\t\\t\\tfmt.Printf(\\\"DEBUG: Got unexpected type %T\\\\n\\\", v)\\n518: \\t\\t\\treturn errs\\n519: \\t\\t}\\n520: \\t}\\n521: \\n522: \\tif len(errs) > 0 {\\n523: \\t\\treturn errs\\n524: \\t}\\n525: \\treturn nil\\n526: }\\n527: \\n528: // seriesLoadingString returns the input series in PromQL notation.\\n529: func (tg *testGroup) seriesLoadingString() string {\\n530: \\tresult := fmt.Sprintf(\\\"load %v\\\\n\\\", shortDuration(tg.Interval))\\n531: \\tfor _, is := range tg.InputSeries {\\n532: \\t\\tresult += fmt.Sprintf(\\\"  %v %v\\\\n\\\", is.Series, is.Values)\\n533: \\t}\\n534: \\treturn result\\n535: }\\n536: \\n537: func shortDuration(d model.Duration) string {\\n538: \\ts := d.String()\\n539: \\tif strings.HasSuffix(s, \\\"m0s\\\") {\\n540: \\t\\ts = s[:len(s)-2]\\n541: \\t}\\n542: \\tif strings.HasSuffix(s, \\\"h0m\\\") {\\n543: \\t\\ts = s[:len(s)-2]\\n544: \\t}\\n545: \\treturn s\\n546: }\\n547: \\n548: // orderedGroups returns a slice of `*rules.Group` from `groupsMap` which follows the order\\n549: // mentioned by `groupOrderMap`. NOTE: This is partial ordering.\\n550: func orderedGroups(groupsMap map[string]*rules.Group, groupOrderMap map[string]int) []*rules.Group {\\n551: \\tgroups := make([]*rules.Group, 0, len(groupsMap))\\n552: \\tfor _, g := range groupsMap {\\n553: \\t\\tgroups = append(groups, g)\\n554: \\t}\\n555: \\tsort.Slice(groups, func(i, j int) bool {\\n556: \\t\\treturn groupOrderMap[groups[i].Name()] < groupOrderMap[groups[j].Name()]\\n557: \\t})\\n558: \\treturn groups\\n559: }\\n560: \\n561: // maxEvalTime returns the max eval time among all alert and promql unit tests.\\n562: func (tg *testGroup) maxEvalTime() time.Duration {\\n563: \\tvar maxd model.Duration\\n564: \\tfor _, alert := range tg.AlertRuleTests {\\n565: \\t\\tif alert.EvalTime > maxd {\\n566: \\t\\t\\tmaxd = alert.EvalTime\\n567: \\t\\t}\\n568: \\t}\\n569: \\tfor _, pet := range tg.PromqlExprTests {\\n570: \\t\\tif pet.EvalTime > maxd {\\n571: \\t\\t\\tmaxd = pet.EvalTime\\n572: \\t\\t}\\n573: \\t}\\n574: \\treturn time.Duration(maxd)\\n575: }\\n576: \\n577: func query(ctx context.Context, qs string, t time.Time, engine *promql.Engine, qu storage.Queryable) (promql.Vector, error) {\\n578: \\tq, err := engine.NewInstantQuery(ctx, qu, nil, qs, t)\\n579: \\tif err != nil {\\n580: \\t\\treturn nil, err\\n581: \\t}\\n582: \\tres := q.Exec(ctx)\\n583: \\tif res.Err != nil {\\n584: \\t\\treturn nil, res.Err\\n585: \\t}\\n586: \\tswitch v := res.Value.(type) {\\n587: \\tcase promql.Vector:\\n588: \\t\\treturn v, nil\\n589: \\tcase promql.Scalar:\\n590: \\t\\treturn promql.Vector{promql.Sample{\\n591: \\t\\t\\tT:      v.T,\\n592: \\t\\t\\tF:      v.V,\\n593: \\t\\t\\tMetric: labels.Labels{},\\n594: \\t\\t}}, nil\\n595: \\tdefault:\\n596: \\t\\treturn nil, errors.New(\\\"rule result is not a vector or scalar\\\")\\n597: \\t}\\n598: }\\n599: \\n600: // indentLines prefixes each line in the supplied string with the given \\\"indent\\\"\\n601: // string.\\n602: func indentLines(lines, indent string) string {\\n603: \\tsb := strings.Builder{}\\n604: \\tn := strings.Split(lines, \\\"\\\\n\\\")\\n605: \\tfor i, l := range n {\\n606: \\t\\tif i > 0 {\\n607: \\t\\t\\tsb.WriteString(indent)\\n608: \\t\\t}\\n609: \\t\\tsb.WriteString(l)\\n610: \\t\\tif i != len(n)-1 {\\n611: \\t\\t\\tsb.WriteRune('\\\\n')\\n612: \\t\\t}\\n613: \\t}\\n614: \\treturn sb.String()\\n615: }\\n616: \\n617: type labelsAndAnnotations []labelAndAnnotation\\n618: \\n619: func (la labelsAndAnnotations) Len() int      { return len(la) }\\n620: func (la labelsAndAnnotations) Swap(i, j int) { la[i], la[j] = la[j], la[i] }\\n621: func (la labelsAndAnnotations) Less(i, j int) bool {\\n622: \\tdiff := labels.Compare(la[i].Labels, la[j].Labels)\\n623: \\tif diff != 0 {\\n624: \\t\\treturn diff < 0\\n625: \\t}\\n626: \\treturn labels.Compare(la[i].Annotations, la[j].Annotations) < 0\\n627: }\\n628: \\n629: func (la labelsAndAnnotations) String() string {\\n630: \\tif len(la) == 0 {\\n631: \\t\\treturn \\\"[]\\\"\\n632: \\t}\\n633: \\ts := \\\"[\\\\n0:\\\" + indentLines(\\\"\\\\n\\\"+la[0].String(), \\\"  \\\")\\n634: \\tfor i, l := range la[1:] {\\n635: \\t\\ts += \\\",\\\\n\\\" + strconv.Itoa(i+1) + \\\":\\\" + indentLines(\\\"\\\\n\\\"+l.String(), \\\"  \\\")\\n636: \\t}\\n637: \\ts += \\\"\\\\n]\\\"\\n638: \\n639: \\treturn s\\n640: }\\n641: \\n642: type labelAndAnnotation struct {\\n643: \\tLabels      labels.Labels\\n644: \\tAnnotations labels.Labels\\n645: }\\n646: \\n647: func (la *labelAndAnnotation) String() string {\\n648: \\treturn \\\"Labels:\\\" + la.Labels.String() + \\\"\\\\nAnnotations:\\\" + la.Annotations.String()\\n649: }\\n650: \\n651: type series struct {\\n652: \\tSeries string `yaml:\\\"series\\\"`\\n653: \\tValues string `yaml:\\\"values\\\"`\\n654: }\\n655: \\n656: type alertTestCase struct {\\n657: \\tEvalTime  model.Duration `yaml:\\\"eval_time\\\"`\\n658: \\tAlertname string         `yaml:\\\"alertname\\\"`\\n659: \\tExpAlerts []alert        `yaml:\\\"exp_alerts\\\"`\\n660: }\\n661: \\n662: type alert struct {\\n663: \\tExpLabels      map[string]string `yaml:\\\"exp_labels\\\"`\\n664: \\tExpAnnotations map[string]string `yaml:\\\"exp_annotations\\\"`\\n665: }\\n666: \\n667: type promqlTestCase struct {\\n668: \\tExpr       string         `yaml:\\\"expr\\\"`\\n669: \\tEvalTime   model.Duration `yaml:\\\"eval_time\\\"`\\n670: \\tExpSamples []sample       `yaml:\\\"exp_samples\\\"`\\n671: }\\n672: \\n673: type sample struct {\\n674: \\tLabels    string  `yaml:\\\"labels\\\"`\\n675: \\tValue     float64 `yaml:\\\"value\\\"`\\n676: \\tHistogram string  `yaml:\\\"histogram\\\"` // A non-empty string means Value is ignored.\\n677: }\\n678: \\n679: // parsedSample is a sample with parsed Labels.\\n680: type parsedSample struct {\\n681: \\tLabels    labels.Labels\\n682: \\tValue     float64\\n683: \\tHistogram string // TestExpression() of histogram.FloatHistogram\\n684: }\\n685: \\n686: func parsedSamplesString(pss []parsedSample) string {\\n687: \\tif len(pss) == 0 {\\n688: \\t\\treturn \\\"nil\\\"\\n689: \\t}\\n690: \\ts := pss[0].String()\\n691: \\tfor _, ps := range pss[1:] {\\n692: \\t\\ts += \\\", \\\" + ps.String()\\n693: \\t}\\n694: \\treturn s\\n695: }\\n696: \\n697: func (ps *parsedSample) String() string {\\n698: \\tif ps.Histogram != \\\"\\\" {\\n699: \\t\\treturn ps.Labels.String() + \\\" \\\" + ps.Histogram\\n700: \\t}\\n701: \\treturn ps.Labels.String() + \\\" \\\" + strconv.FormatFloat(ps.Value, 'E', -1, 64)\\n702: }\\n703: the main React app's index.html,\\n67: // no matter if agent mode is enabled or not.\\n68: var oldUIReactRouterPaths = []string{\\n69: \\t\\\"/config\\\",\\n70: \\t\\\"/flags\\\",\\n71: oldUIReactRouterServerPaths = []string{\\n92: \\t\\\"/alerts\\\",\\n93: \\t\\\"/graph\\\",\\n94: \\t\\\"/rules\\\",\\n95: \\t\\\"/tsdb-status\\\",\\n96: }\\n97: \\n98: var newUIReactRouterServerPaths = []string{\\n99: \\t\\\"/alerts\\\",\\n100: \\t\\\"/query\\\", // The old /graph redirects to /query on the server side.\\n101: \\t\\\"/rules\\\",\\n102: \\t\\\"/tsdb-status\\\",\\n103: }\\n104: \\n105: type ReadyStatus uint32\\n106: \\n107: const (\\n108: \\tNotReady ReadyStatus = iota\\n109: \\tReady\\n110: \\tStopping\\n111: )\\n112: \\n113: // withStackTracer logs the stack trace in case the request panics. The function\\n114: // will re-raise the error which will then be handled by the net/http package.\\n115: // It is needed because the go-kit log package doesn't manage properly the\\n116: // panics from net/http (see https://github.com/go-kit/kit/issues/233).\\n117: func withStackTracer(h http.Handler, l *slog.Logger) http.Handler {\\n118: \\treturn http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\\n119: \\t\\tdefer func() {\\n120: \\t\\t\\tif err := recover(); err != nil {\\n121: \\t\\t\\t\\tconst size = 64 << 10\\n122: \\t\\t\\t\\tbuf := make([]byte, size)\\n123: \\t\\t\\t\\tbuf = buf[:runtime.Stack(buf, false)]\\n124: \\t\\t\\t\\tl.Error(\\\"panic while serving request\\\", \\\"client\\\", r.RemoteAddr, \\\"url\\\", r.URL, \\\"err\\\", err, \\\"stack\\\", buf)\\n125: \\t\\t\\t\\tpanic(err)\\n126: \\t\\t\\t}\\n127: \\t\\t}()\\n128: \\t\\th.ServeHTTP(w, r)\\n129: \\t})\\n130: }\\n131: \\n132: type metrics struct {\\n133: \\trequestCounter  *prometheus.CounterVec\\n134: \\trequestDuration *prometheus.HistogramVec\\n135: \\tresponseSize    *prometheus.HistogramVec\\n136: \\treadyStatus     prometheus.Gauge\\n137: }\\n138: \\n139: func newMetrics(r prometheus.Registerer) *metrics {\\n140: \\tm := &metrics{\\n141: \\t\\trequestCounter: prometheus.NewCounterVec(\\n142: \\t\\t\\tprometheus.CounterOpts{\\n143: \\t\\t\\t\\tName: \\\"prometheus_http_requests_total\\\",\\n144: \\t\\t\\t\\tHelp: \\\"Counter of HTTP requests.\\\",\\n145: \\t\\t\\t},\\n146: \\t\\t\\t[]string{\\\"handler\\\", \\\"code\\\"},\\n147: \\t\\t),\\n148: \\t\\trequestDuration: prometheus.NewHistogramVec(\\n149: \\t\\t\\tprometheus.HistogramOpts{\\n150: \\t\\t\\t\\tName:                            \\\"prometheus_http_request_duration_seconds\\\",\\n151: \\t\\t\\t\\tHelp:                            \\\"Histogram of latencies for HTTP requests.\\\",\\n152: \\t\\t\\t\\tBuckets:                         []float64{.1, .2, .4, 1, 3, 8, 20, 60, 120},\\n153: \\t\\t\\t\\tNativeHistogramBucketFactor:     1.1,\\n154: \\t\\t\\t\\tNativeHistogramMaxBucketNumber:  100,\\n155: \\t\\t\\t\\tNativeHistogramMinResetDuration: 1 * time.Hour,\\n156: \\t\\t\\t},\\n157: \\t\\t\\t[]string{\\\"handler\\\"},\\n158: \\t\\t),\\n159: \\t\\tresponseSize: prometheus.NewHistogramVec(\\n160: \\t\\t\\tprometheus.HistogramOpts{\\n161: \\t\\t\\t\\tName:    \\\"prometheus_http_response_size_bytes\\\",\\n162: \\t\\t\\t\\tHelp:    \\\"Histogram of response size for HTTP requests.\\\",\\n163: \\t\\t\\t\\tBuckets: prometheus.ExponentialBuckets(100, 10, 8),\\n164: \\t\\t\\t},\\n165: \\t\\t\\t[]string{\\\"handler\\\"},\\n166: \\t\\t),\\n167: \\t\\treadyStatus: prometheus.NewGauge(prometheus.GaugeOpts{\\n168: \\t\\t\\tName: \\\"prometheus_ready\\\",\\n169: \\t\\t\\tHelp: \\\"Whether Prometheus startup was fully completed and the server is ready for normal operation.\\\",\\n170: \\t\\t}),\\n171: \\t}\\n172: \\n173: \\tif r != nil {\\n174: \\t\\tr.MustRegister(m.requestCounter, m.requestDuration, m.responseSize, m.readyStatus)\\n175: \\t\\tregisterFederationMetrics(r)\\n176: \\t}\\n177: \\treturn m\\n178: }\\n179: \\n180: func (m *metrics) instrumentHandlerWithPrefix(prefix string) func(handlerName string, handler http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\\n181: \\treturn func(handlerName string, handler http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\\n182: \\t\\treturn m.instrumentHandler(prefix+handlerName, handler)\\n183: \\t}\\n184: }\\n185: \\n186: func (m *metrics) instrumentHandler(handlerName string, handler http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\\n187: \\tm.requestCounter.WithLabelValues(handlerName, \\\"200\\\")\\n188: \\treturn promhttp.InstrumentHandlerCounter(\\n189: \\t\\tm.requestCounter.MustCurryWith(prometheus.Labels{\\\"handler\\\": handlerName}),\\n190: \\t\\tpromhttp.InstrumentHandlerDuration(\\n191: \\t\\t\\tm.requestDuration.MustCurryWith(prometheus.Labels{\\\"handler\\\": handlerName}),\\n192: \\t\\t\\tpromhttp.InstrumentHandlerResponseSize(\\n193: \\t\\t\\t\\tm.responseSize.MustCurryWith(prometheus.Labels{\\\"handler\\\": handlerName}),\\n194: \\t\\t\\t\\thandler,\\n195: \\t\\t\\t),\\n196: \\t\\t),\\n197: \\t)\\n198: }\\n199: \\n200: // PrometheusVersion contains build information about Prometheus.\\n201: type PrometheusVersion = api_v1.PrometheusVersion\\n202: \\n203: type LocalStorage interface {\\n204: \\tstorage.Storage\\n205: \\tapi_v1.TSDBAdminStats\\n206: }\\n207: \\n208: // Handler serves various HTTP endpoints of the Prometheus server.\\n209: type Handler struct {\\n210: \\tlogger *slog.Logger\\n211: \\n212: \\tgatherer prometheus.Gatherer\\n213: \\tmetrics  *metrics\\n214: \\n215: \\tscrapeManager   *scrape.Manager\\n216: \\truleManager     *rules.Manager\\n217: \\tqueryEngine     *promql.Engine\\n218: \\tlookbackDelta   time.Duration\\n219: \\tcontext         context.Context\\n220: \\tstorage         storage.Storage\\n221: \\tlocalStorage    LocalStorage\\n222: \\texemplarStorage storage.ExemplarQueryable\\n223: \\tnotifier        *notifier.Manager\\n224: \\n225: \\tapiV1 *api_v1.API\\n226: \\n227: \\trouter      *route.Router\\n228: \\tquitCh      chan struct{}\\n229: \\tquitOnce    sync.Once\\n230: \\treloadCh    chan chan error\\n231: \\toptions     *Options\\n232: \\tconfig      *config.Config\\n233: \\tversionInfo *PrometheusVersion\\n234: \\tbirth       time.Time\\n235: \\tcwd         string\\n236: \\tflagsMap    map[string]string\\n237: \\n238: \\tmtx sync.RWMutex\\n239: \\tnow func() model.Time\\n240: \\n241: \\tready atomic.Uint32 // ready is uint32 rather than boolean to be able to use atomic functions.\\n242: }\\n243: \\n244: // ApplyConfig updates the config field of the Handler struct.\\n245: func (h *Handler) ApplyConfig(conf *config.Config) error {\\n246: \\th.mtx.Lock()\\n247: \\tdefer h.mtx.Unlock()\\n248: \\n249: \\th.config = conf\\n250: \\n251: \\treturn nil\\n252: }\\n253: \\n254: // Options for the web Handler.\\n255: type Options struct {\\n256: \\tContext               context.Context\\n257: \\tTSDBRetentionDuration model.Duration\\n258: \\tTSDBDir               string\\n259: \\tTSDBMaxBytes          units.Base2Bytes\\n260: \\tLocalStorage          LocalStorage\\n261: \\tStorage               storage.Storage\\n262: \\tExemplarStorage       storage.ExemplarQueryable\\n263: \\tQueryEngine           *promql.Engine\\n264: \\tLookbackDelta         time.Duration\\n265: \\tScrapeManager         *scrape.Manager\\n266: \\tRuleManager           *rules.Manager\\n267: \\tNotifier              *notifier.Manager\\n268: \\tVersion               *PrometheusVersion\\n269: \\tNotificationsGetter   func() []notifications.Notification\\n270: \\tNotificationsSub      func() (<-chan notifications.Notification, func(), bool)\\n271: \\tFlags                 map[string]string\\n272: \\n273: \\tListenAddresses            []string\\n274: \\tCORSOrigin                 *regexp.Regexp\\n275: \\tReadTimeout                time.Duration\\n276: \\tMaxConnections             int\\n277: \\tExternalURL                *url.URL\\n278: \\tRoutePrefix                string\\n279: \\tUseLocalAssets             bool\\n280: \\tUserAssetsPath             string\\n281: \\tConsoleTemplatesPath       string\\n282: \\tConsoleLibrariesPath       string\\n283: \\tUseOldUI                   bool\\n284: \\tEnableLifecycle            bool\\n285: \\tEnableAdminAPI             bool\\n286: \\tPageTitle                  string\\n287: \\tRemoteReadSampleLimit      int\\n288: \\tRemoteReadConcurrencyLimit int\\n289: \\tRemoteReadBytesInFrame     int\\n290: \\tEnableRemoteWriteReceiver  bool\\n291: \\tEnableOTLPWriteReceiver    bool\\n292: \\tConvertOTLPDelta           bool\\n293: \\tNativeOTLPDeltaIngestion   bool\\n294: \\tIsAgent                    bool\\n295: \\tCTZeroIngestionEnabled     bool\\n296: \\tEnableTypeAndUnitLabels    bool\\n297: \\tAppName                    string\\n298: \\n299: \\tAcceptRemoteWriteProtoMsgs []config.RemoteWriteProtoMsg\\n300: \\n301: \\tGatherer   prometheus.Gatherer\\n302: \\tRegisterer prometheus.Registerer\\n303: }\\n304: \\n305: // New initializes a new web Handler.\\n306: func New(logger *slog.Logger, o *Options) *Handler {\\n307: \\tif logger == nil {\\n308: \\t\\tlogger = promslog.NewNopLogger()\\n309: \\t}\\n310: \\n311: \\tm := newMetrics(o.Registerer)\\n312: \\trouter := route.New().\\n313: \\t\\tWithInstrumentation(m.instrumentHandler).\\n314: \\t\\tWithInstrumentation(setPathWithPrefix(\\\"\\\"))\\n315: \\n316: \\tcwd, err := os.Getwd()\\n317: \\tif err != nil {\\n318: \\t\\tcwd = \\\"<error retrieving current working directory>\\\"\\n319: \\t}\\n320: \\n321: \\th := &Handler{\\n322: \\t\\tlogger: logger,\\n323: \\n324: \\t\\tgatherer: o.Gatherer,\\n325: \\t\\tmetrics:  m,\\n326: \\n327: \\t\\trouter:      router,\\n328: \\t\\tquitCh:      make(chan struct{}),\\n329: \\t\\treloadCh:    make(chan chan error),\\n330: \\t\\toptions:     o,\\n331: \\t\\tversionInfo: o.Version,\\n332: \\t\\tbirth:       time.Now().UTC(),\\n333: \\t\\tcwd:         cwd,\\n334: \\t\\tflagsMap:    o.Flags,\\n335: \\n336: \\t\\tcontext:         o.Context,\\n337: \\t\\tscrapeManager:   o.ScrapeManager,\\n338: \\t\\truleManager:     o.RuleManager,\\n339: \\t\\tqueryEngine:     o.QueryEngine,\\n340: \\t\\tlookbackDelta:   o.LookbackDelta,\\n341: \\t\\tstorage:         o.Storage,\\n342: \\t\\tlocalStorage:    o.LocalStorage,\\n343: \\t\\texemplarStorage: o.ExemplarStorage,\\n344: \\t\\tnotifier:        o.Notifier,\\n345: \\n346: \\t\\tnow: model.Now,\\n347: \\t}\\n348: \\th.SetReady(NotReady)\\n349: \\n350: \\tfactorySPr := func(context.Context) api_v1.ScrapePoolsRetriever { return h.scrapeManager }\\n351: \\tfactoryTr := func(context.Context) api_v1.TargetRetriever { return h.scrapeManager }\\n352: \\tfactoryAr := func(context.Context) api_v1.AlertmanagerRetriever { return h.notifier }\\n353: \\tFactoryRr := func(context.Context) api_v1.RulesRetriever { return h.ruleManager }\\n354: \\n355: \\tvar app storage.Appendable\\n356: \\tif o.EnableRemoteWriteReceiver || o.EnableOTLPWriteReceiver {\\n357: \\t\\tapp = h.storage\\n358: \\t}\\n359: \\n360: \\th.apiV1 = api_v1.NewAPI(h.queryEngine, h.storage, app, h.exemplarStorage, factorySPr, factoryTr, factoryAr,\\n361: \\t\\tfunc() config.Config {\\n362: \\t\\t\\th.mtx.RLock()\\n363: \\t\\t\\tdefer h.mtx.RUnlock()\\n364: \\t\\t\\treturn *h.config\\n365: \\t\\t},\\n366: \\t\\to.Flags,\\n367: \\t\\tapi_v1.GlobalURLOptions{\\n368: \\t\\t\\tListenAddress: o.ListenAddresses[0],\\n369: \\t\\t\\tHost:          o.ExternalURL.Host,\\n370: \\t\\t\\tScheme:        o.ExternalURL.Scheme,\\n371: \\t\\t},\\n372: \\t\\th.testReady,\\n373: \\t\\th.options.LocalStorage,\\n374: \\t\\th.options.TSDBDir,\\n375: \\t\\th.options.EnableAdminAPI,\\n376: \\t\\tlogger,\\n377: \\t\\tFactoryRr,\\n378: \\t\\th.options.RemoteReadSampleLimit,\\n379: \\t\\th.options.RemoteReadConcurrencyLimit,\\n380: \\t\\th.options.RemoteReadBytesInFrame,\\n381: \\t\\th.options.IsAgent,\\n382: \\t\\th.options.CORSOrigin,\\n383: \\t\\th.runtimeInfo,\\n384: \\t\\th.versionInfo,\\n385: \\t\\th.options.NotificationsGetter,\\n386: \\t\\th.options.NotificationsSub,\\n387: \\t\\to.Gatherer,\\n388: \\t\\to.Registerer,\\n389: \\t\\tnil,\\n390: \\t\\to.EnableRemoteWriteReceiver,\\n391: \\t\\to.AcceptRemoteWriteProtoMsgs,\\n392: \\t\\to.EnableOTLPWriteReceiver,\\n393: \\t\\to.ConvertOTLPDelta,\\n394: \\t\\to.NativeOTLPDeltaIngestion,\\n395: \\t\\to.CTZeroIngestionEnabled,\\n396: \\t\\to.LookbackDelta,\\n397: \\t\\to.EnableTypeAndUnitLabels,\\n398: \\t\\tnil,\\n399: \\t)\\n400: \\n401: \\tif o.RoutePrefix != \\\"/\\\" {\\n402: \\t\\t// If the prefix is missing for the root path, prepend it.\\n403: \\t\\trouter.Get(\\\"/\\\", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\\n404: \\t\\t\\thttp.Redirect(w, r, o.RoutePrefix, http.StatusFound)\\n405: \\t\\t})\\n406: \\t\\trouter = router.WithPrefix(o.RoutePrefix)\\n407: \\t}\\n408: \\n409: \\thomePage := \\\"/query\\\"\\n410: \\tif o.UseOldUI {\\n411: \\t\\thomePage = \\\"/graph\\\"\\n412: \\t}\\n413: \\tif o.IsAgent {\\n414: \\t\\thomePage = \\\"/agent\\\"\\n415: \\t}\\n416: \\n417: \\treadyf := h.testReady\\n418: \\n419: \\trouter.Get(\\\"/\\\", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\\n420: \\t\\thttp.Redirect(w, r, path.Join(o.ExternalURL.Path, homePage), http.StatusFound)\\n421: \\t})\\n422: \\n423: \\tif !o.UseOldUI {\\n424: \\t\\trouter.Get(\\\"/graph\\\", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\\n425: \\t\\t\\thttp.Redirect(w, r, path.Join(o.ExternalURL.Path, \\\"/query?\\\"+r.URL.RawQuery), http.StatusFound)\\n426: \\t\\t})\\n427: \\t}\\n428: \\n429: \\treactAssetsRoot := \\\"/static/mantine-ui\\\"\\n430: \\tif h.options.UseOldUI {\\n431: \\t\\treactAssetsRoot = \\\"/static/react-app\\\"\\n432: \\t}\\n433: \\n434: \\t// The console library examples at 'console_libraries/prom.lib' still depend on old asset files being served under `classic`.\\n435: \\trouter.Get(\\\"/classic/static/*filepath\\\", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\\n436: \\t\\tr.URL.Path = path.Join(\\\"/static\\\", route.Param(r.Context(), \\\"filepath\\\"))\\n437: \\t\\tfs := server.StaticFileServer(ui.Assets)\\n438: \\t\\tfs.ServeHTTP(w, r)\\n439: \\t})\\n440: \\n441: \\trouter.Get(\\\"/version\\\", h.version)\\n442: \\trouter.Get(\\\"/metrics\\\", promhttp.Handler().ServeHTTP)\\n443: \\n444: \\trouter.Get(\\\"/federate\\\", readyf(httputil.CompressionHandler{\\n445: \\t\\tHandler: http.HandlerFunc(h.federation),\\n446: \\t}.ServeHTTP))\\n447: \\n448: \\trouter.Get(\\\"/consoles/*filepath\\\", readyf(h.consoles))\\n449: \\n450: \\tserveReactApp := func(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {\\n451: \\t\\tindexPath := reactAssetsRoot + \\\"/index.html\\\"\\n452: \\t\\tf, err := ui.Assets.Open(indexPath)\\n453: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n454: \\t\\t\\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)\\n455: \\t\\t\\tfmt.Fprintf(w, \\\"Error opening React index.html: %v\\\", err)\\n456: \\t\\t\\treturn\\n457: \\t\\t}\\n458: \\t\\tdefer func() { _ = f.Close() }()\\n459: \\t\\tidx, err := io.ReadAll(f)\\n460: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n461: \\t\\t\\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)\\n462: \\t\\t\\tfmt.Fprintf(w, \\\"Error reading React index.html: %v\\\", err)\\n463: \\t\\t\\treturn\\n464: \\t\\t}\\n465: \\t\\treplacedIdx := bytes.ReplaceAll(idx, []byte(\\\"CONSOLES_LINK_PLACEHOLDER\\\"), []byte(h.consolesPath()))\\n466: \\t\\treplacedIdx = bytes.ReplaceAll(replacedIdx, []byte(\\\"TITLE_PLACEHOLDER\\\"), []byte(h.options.PageTitle))\\n467: \\t\\treplacedIdx = bytes.ReplaceAll(replacedIdx, []byte(\\\"AGENT_MODE_PLACEHOLDER\\\"), []byte(strconv.FormatBool(h.options.IsAgent)))\\n468: \\t\\treplacedIdx = bytes.ReplaceAll(replacedIdx, []byte(\\\"READY_PLACEHOLDER\\\"), []byte(strconv.FormatBool(h.isReady())))\\n469: \\t\\treplacedIdx = bytes.ReplaceAll(replacedIdx, []byte(\\\"LOOKBACKDELTA_PLACEHOLDER\\\"), []byte(model.Duration(h.options.LookbackDelta).String()))\\n470: \\t\\tw.Write(replacedIdx)\\n471: \\t}\\n472: \\n473: \\t// Serve the React app.\\n474: \\treactRouterPaths := newUIReactRouterPaths\\n475: \\treactRouterServerPaths := newUIReactRouterServerPaths\\n476: \\tif h.options.UseOldUI {\\n477: \\t\\treactRouterPaths = oldUIReactRouterPaths\\n478: \\t\\treactRouterServerPaths = oldUIReactRouterServerPaths\\n479: \\t}\\n480: \\n481: \\tfor _, p := range reactRouterPaths {\\n482: \\t\\trouter.Get(p, serveReactApp)\\n483: \\t}\\n484: \\n485: \\tif h.options.IsAgent {\\n486: \\t\\tfor _, p := range reactRouterAgentPaths {\\n487: \\t\\t\\trouter.Get(p, serveReactApp)\\n488: \\t\\t}\\n489: \\t} else {\\n490: \\t\\tfor _, p := range reactRouterServerPaths {\\n491: \\t\\t\\trouter.Get(p, serveReactApp)\\n492: \\t\\t}\\n493: \\t}\\n494: \\n495: \\t// The favicon and manifest are bundled as part of the React app, but we want to serve\\n496: \\t// them on the root.\\n497: \\tfor _, p := range []string{\\\"/favicon.svg\\\", \\\"/favicon.ico\\\", \\\"/manifest.json\\\"} {\\n498: \\t\\tassetPath := reactAssetsRoot + p\\n499: \\t\\trouter.Get(p, func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\\n500: \\t\\t\\tr.URL.Path = assetPath\\n501: \\t\\t\\tfs := server.StaticFileServer(ui.Assets)\\n502: \\t\\t\\tfs.ServeHTTP(w, r)\\n503: \\t\\t})\\n504: \\t}\\n505: \\n506: \\treactStaticAssetsDir := \\\"/assets\\\"\\n507: \\tif h.options.UseOldUI {\\n508: \\t\\treactStaticAssetsDir = \\\"/static\\\"\\n509: \\t}\\n510: \\t// Static files required by the React app.\\n511: \\trouter.Get(reactStaticAssetsDir+\\\"/*filepath\\\", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\\n512: \\t\\tr.URL.Path = path.Join(reactAssetsRoot+reactStaticAssetsDir, route.Param(r.Context(), \\\"filepath\\\"))\\n513: \\t\\tfs := server.StaticFileServer(ui.Assets)\\n514: \\t\\tfs.ServeHTTP(w, r)\\n515: \\t})\\n516: \\n517: \\tif o.UserAssetsPath != \\\"\\\" {\\n518: \\t\\trouter.Get(\\\"/user/*filepath\\\", route.FileServe(o.UserAssetsPath))\\n519: \\t}\\n520: \\n521: \\tif o.EnableLifecycle {\\n522: \\t\\trouter.Post(\\\"/-/quit\\\", h.quit)\\n523: \\t\\trouter.Put(\\\"/-/quit\\\", h.quit)\\n524: \\t\\trouter.Post(\\\"/-/reload\\\", h.reload)\\n525: \\t\\trouter.Put(\\\"/-/reload\\\", h.reload)\\n526: \\t} else {\\n527: \\t\\tforbiddenAPINotEnabled := func(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {\\n528: \\t\\t\\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusForbidden)\\n529: \\t\\t\\tw.Write([]byte(\\\"Lifecycle API is not enabled.\\\"))\\n530: \\t\\t}\\n531: \\t\\trouter.Post(\\\"/-/quit\\\", forbiddenAPINotEnabled)\\n532: \\t\\trouter.Put(\\\"/-/quit\\\", forbiddenAPINotEnabled)\\n533: \\t\\trouter.Post(\\\"/-/reload\\\", forbiddenAPINotEnabled)\\n534: \\t\\trouter.Put(\\\"/-/reload\\\", forbiddenAPINotEnabled)\\n535: \\t}\\n536: \\trouter.Get(\\\"/-/quit\\\", func(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {\\n537: \\t\\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)\\n538: \\t\\tw.Write([]byte(\\\"Only POST or PUT requests allowed\\\"))\\n539: \\t})\\n540: \\trouter.Get(\\\"/-/reload\\\", func(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {\\n541: \\t\\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)\\n542: \\t\\tw.Write([]byte(\\\"Only POST or PUT requests allowed\\\"))\\n543: \\t})\\n544: \\n545: \\trouter.Get(\\\"/debug/*subpath\\\", serveDebug)\\n546: \\trouter.Post(\\\"/debug/*subpath\\\", serveDebug)\\n547: \\n548: \\trouter.Get(\\\"/-/healthy\\\", func(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {\\n549: \\t\\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\\n550: \\t\\tfmt.Fprintf(w, \\\"%s is Healthy.\\\\n\\\", o.AppName)\\n551: \\t})\\n552: \\trouter.Head(\\\"/-/healthy\\\", func(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {\\n553: \\t\\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\\n554: \\t})\\n555: \\trouter.Get(\\\"/-/ready\\\", readyf(func(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {\\n556: \\t\\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\\n557: \\t\\tfmt.Fprintf(w, \\\"%s is Ready.\\\\n\\\", o.AppName)\\n558: \\t}))\\n559: \\trouter.Head(\\\"/-/ready\\\", readyf(func(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {\\n560: \\t\\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)\\n561: \\t}))\\n562: \\n563: \\treturn h\\n564: }\\n565: \\n566: func serveDebug(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {\\n567: \\tctx := req.Context()\\n568: \\tsubpath := route.Param(ctx, \\\"subpath\\\")\\n569: \\n570: \\tif subpath == \\\"/pprof\\\" {\\n571: \\t\\thttp.Redirect(w, req, req.URL.Path+\\\"/\\\", http.StatusMovedPermanently)\\n572: \\t\\treturn\\n573: \\t}\\n574: \\n575: \\tif !strings.HasPrefix(subpath, \\\"/pprof/\\\") {\\n576: \\t\\thttp.NotFound(w, req)\\n577: \\t\\treturn\\n578: \\t}\\n579: \\tsubpath = strings.TrimPrefix(subpath, \\\"/pprof/\\\")\\n580: \\n581: \\tswitch subpath {\\n582: \\tcase \\\"cmdline\\\":\\n583: \\t\\tpprof.Cmdline(w, req)\\n584: \\tcase \\\"profile\\\":\\n585: \\t\\tpprof.Profile(w, req)\\n586: \\tcase \\\"symbol\\\":\\n587: \\t\\tpprof.Symbol(w, req)\\n588: \\tcase \\\"trace\\\":\\n589: \\t\\tpprof.Trace(w, req)\\n590: \\tdefault:\\n591: \\t\\treq.URL.Path = \\\"/debug/pprof/\\\" + subpath\\n592: \\t\\tpprof.Index(w, req)\\n593: \\t}\\n594: }\\n595: \\n596: // SetReady sets the ready status of our web Handler.\\n597: func (h *Handler) SetReady(v ReadyStatus) {\\n598: \\tif v == Ready {\\n599: \\t\\th.ready.Store(uint32(Ready))\\n600: \\t\\th.metrics.readyStatus.Set(1)\\n601: \\t\\treturn\\n602: \\t}\\n603: \\n604: \\th.ready.Store(uint32(v))\\n605: \\th.metrics.readyStatus.Set(0)\\n606: }\\n607: \\n608: // Verifies whether the server is ready or not.\\n609: func (h *Handler) isReady() bool {\\n610: \\treturn ReadyStatus(h.ready.Load()) == Ready\\n611: }\\n612: \\n613: // Checks if server is ready, calls f if it is, returns 503 if it is not.\\n614: func (h *Handler) testReady(f http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\\n615: \\treturn func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\\n616: \\t\\tswitch ReadyStatus(h.ready.Load()) {\\n617: \\t\\tcase Ready:\\n618: \\t\\t\\tf(w, r)\\n619: \\t\\tcase NotReady:\\n620: \\t\\t\\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusServiceUnavailable)\\n621: \\t\\t\\tw.Header().Set(\\\"X-Prometheus-Stopping\\\", \\\"false\\\")\\n622: \\t\\t\\tfmt.Fprintf(w, \\\"Service Unavailable\\\")\\n623: \\t\\tcase Stopping:\\n624: \\t\\t\\tw.Header().Set(\\\"X-Prometheus-Stopping\\\", \\\"true\\\")\\n625: \\t\\t\\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusServiceUnavailable)\\n626: \\t\\t\\tfmt.Fprintf(w, \\\"Service Unavailable\\\")\\n627: \\t\\tdefault:\\n628: \\t\\t\\tw.WriteHeader(http.StatusInternalServerError)\\n629: \\t\\t\\tfmt.Fprintf(w, \\\"Unknown state\\\")\\n630: \\t\\t}\\n631: \\t}\\n632: }\\n633: \\n634: // Quit returns the receive-only quit channel.\\n635: func (h *Handler) Quit() <-chan struct{} {\\n636: \\treturn h.quitCh\\n637: }\\n638: \\n639: // Reload returns the receive-only channel that signals configuration reload requests.\\n640: func (h *Handler) Reload() <-chan chan error {\\n641: \\treturn h.reloadCh\\n642: }\\n643: \\n644: // Listeners creates the TCP listeners for web requests.\\n645: func (h *Handler) Listeners() ([]net.Listener, error) {\\n646: \\tvar listeners []net.Listener\\n647: \\tsem := netconnlimit.NewSharedSemaphore(h.options.MaxConnections)\\n648: \\tfor _, address := range h.options.ListenAddresses {\\n649: \\t\\tlistener, err := h.Listener(address, sem)\\n650: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n651: \\t\\t\\treturn listeners, err\\n652: \\t\\t}\\n653: \\t\\tlisteners = append(listeners, listener)\\n654: \\t}\\n655: \\treturn listeners, nil\\n656: }\\n657: \\n658: // Listener creates the TCP listener for web requests.\\n659: func (h *Handler) Listener(address string, sem chan struct{}) (net.Listener, error) {\\n660: \\th.logger.Info(\\\"Start listening for connections\\\", \\\"address\\\", address)\\n661: \\n662: \\tlistener, err := net.Listen(\\\"tcp\\\", address)\\n663: \\tif err != nil {\\n664: \\t\\treturn listener, err\\n665: \\t}\\n666: \\tlistener = netconnlimit.SharedLimitListener(listener, sem)\\n667: \\n668: \\t// Monitor incoming connections with conntrack.\\n669: \\tlistener = conntrack.NewListener(listener,\\n670: \\t\\tconntrack.TrackWithName(\\\"http\\\"),\\n671: \\t\\tconntrack.TrackWithTracing())\\n672: \\n673: \\treturn listener, nil\\n674: }\\n675: \\n676: // Run serves the HTTP endpoints.\\n677: func (h *Handler) Run(ctx context.Context, listeners []net.Listener, webConfig string) error {\\n678: \\tif len(listeners) == 0 {\\n679: \\t\\tvar err error\\n680: \\t\\tlisteners, err = h.Listeners()\\n681: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n682: \\t\\t\\treturn err\\n683: \\t\\t}\\n684: \\t}\\n685: \\n686: \\tmux := http.NewServeMux()\\n687: \\tmux.Handle(\\\"/\\\", h.router)\\n688: \\n689: \\tapiPath := \\\"/api\\\"\\n690: \\tif h.options.RoutePrefix != \\\"/\\\" {\\n691: \\t\\tapiPath = h.options.RoutePrefix + apiPath\\n692: \\t\\th.logger.Info(\\\"Router prefix\\\", \\\"prefix\\\", h.options.RoutePrefix)\\n693: \\t}\\n694: \\tav1 := route.New().\\n695: \\t\\tWithInstrumentation(h.metrics.instrumentHandlerWithPrefix(\\\"/api/v1\\\")).\\n696: \\t\\tWithInstrumentation(setPathWithPrefix(apiPath + \\\"/v1\\\"))\\n697: \\th.apiV1.Register(av1)\\n698: \\n699: \\tmux.Handle(apiPath+\\\"/v1/\\\", http.StripPrefix(apiPath+\\\"/v1\\\", av1))\\n700: \\n701: \\terrlog := slog.NewLogLogger(h.logger.Handler(), slog.LevelError)\\n702: \\n703: \\tspanNameFormatter := otelhttp.WithSpanNameFormatter(func(_ string, r *http.Request) string {\\n704: \\t\\treturn fmt.Sprintf(\\\"%s %s\\\", r.Method, r.URL.Path)\\n705: \\t})\\n706: \\n707: \\thttpSrv := &http.Server{\\n708: \\t\\tHandler:     withStackTracer(otelhttp.NewHandler(mux, \\\"\\\", spanNameFormatter), h.logger),\\n709: \\t\\tErrorLog:    errlog,\\n710: \\t\\tReadTimeout: h.options.ReadTimeout,\\n711: \\t}\\n712: \\n713: \\terrCh := make(chan error, 1)\\n714: \\tgo func() {\\n715: \\t\\terrCh <- toolkit_web.ServeMultiple(listeners, httpSrv, &toolkit_web.FlagConfig{WebConfigFile: &webConfig}, h.logger)\\n716: \\t}()\\n717: \\n718: \\tselect {\\n719: \\tcase e := <-errCh:\\n720: \\t\\treturn e\\n721: \\tcase <-ctx.Done():\\n722: \\t\\thttpSrv.Shutdown(ctx)\\n723: \\t\\treturn nil\\n724: \\t}\\n725: }\\n726: \\n727: func (h *Handler) consoles(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\\n728: \\tctx := r.Context()\\n729: \\tname := route.Param(ctx, \\\"filepath\\\")\\n730: \\n731: \\tfile, err := http.Dir(h.options.ConsoleTemplatesPath).Open(name)\\n732: \\tif err != nil {\\n733: \\t\\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusNotFound)\\n734: \\t\\treturn\\n735: \\t}\\n736: \\tdefer file.Close()\\n737: \\ttext, err := io.ReadAll(file)\\n738: \\tif err != nil {\\n739: \\t\\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\\n740: \\t\\treturn\\n741: \\t}\\n742: \\n743: \\tctx = httputil.ContextFromRequest(ctx, r)\\n744: \\n745: \\t// Provide URL parameters as a map for easy use. Advanced users may have need for\\n746: \\t// parameters beyond the first, so provide RawParams.\\n747: \\trawParams, err := url.ParseQuery(r.URL.RawQuery)\\n748: \\tif err != nil {\\n749: \\t\\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)\\n750: \\t\\treturn\\n751: \\t}\\n752: \\tparams := map[string]string{}\\n753: \\tfor k, v := range rawParams {\\n754: \\t\\tparams[k] = v[0]\\n755: \\t}\\n756: \\n757: \\th.mtx.RLock()\\n758: \\tels := h.config.GlobalConfig.ExternalLabels\\n759: \\th.mtx.RUnlock()\\n760: \\texternalLabels := els.Map()\\n761: \\n762: \\t// Inject some convenience variables that are easier to remember for users\\n763: \\t// who are not used to Go's templating system.\\n764: \\tdefs := []string{\\n765: \\t\\t\\\"{{$rawParams := .RawParams }}\\\",\\n766: \\t\\t\\\"{{$params := .Params}}\\\",\\n767: \\t\\t\\\"{{$path := .Path}}\\\",\\n768: \\t\\t\\\"{{$externalLabels := .ExternalLabels}}\\\",\\n769: \\t}\\n770: \\n771: \\tdata := struct {\\n772: \\t\\tRawParams      url.Values\\n773: \\t\\tParams         map[string]string\\n774: \\t\\tPath           string\\n775: \\t\\tExternalLabels map[string]string\\n776: \\t}{\\n777: \\t\\tRawParams:      rawParams,\\n778: \\t\\tParams:         params,\\n779: \\t\\tPath:           strings.TrimLeft(name, \\\"/\\\"),\\n780: \\t\\tExternalLabels: externalLabels,\\n781: \\t}\\n782: \\n783: \\ttmpl := template.NewTemplateExpander(\\n784: \\t\\tctx,\\n785: \\t\\tstrings.Join(append(defs, string(text)), \\\"\\\"),\\n786: \\t\\t\\\"__console_\\\"+name,\\n787: \\t\\tdata,\\n788: \\t\\th.now(),\\n789: \\t\\ttemplate.QueryFunc(rules.EngineQueryFunc(h.queryEngine, h.storage)),\\n790: \\t\\th.options.ExternalURL,\\n791: \\t\\tnil,\\n792: \\t)\\n793: \\tfilenames, err := filepath.Glob(h.options.ConsoleLibrariesPath + \\\"/*.lib\\\")\\n794: \\tif err != nil {\\n795: \\t\\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\\n796: \\t\\treturn\\n797: \\t}\\n798: \\tresult, err := tmpl.ExpandHTML(filenames)\\n799: \\tif err != nil {\\n800: \\t\\thttp.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)\\n801: \\t\\treturn\\n802: \\t}\\n803: \\tio.WriteString(w, result)\\n804: }\\n805: \\n806: func (h *Handler) runtimeInfo() (api_v1.RuntimeInfo, error) {\\n807: \\tstatus := api_v1.RuntimeInfo{\\n808: \\t\\tStartTime:      h.birth,\\n809: \\t\\tCWD:            h.cwd,\\n810: \\t\\tGoroutineCount: runtime.NumGoroutine(),\\n811: \\t\\tGOMAXPROCS:     runtime.GOMAXPROCS(0),\\n812: \\t\\tGOMEMLIMIT:     debug.SetMemoryLimit(-1),\\n813: \\t\\tGOGC:           os.Getenv(\\\"GOGC\\\"),\\n814: \\t\\tGODEBUG:        os.Getenv(\\\"GODEBUG\\\"),\\n815: \\t}\\n816: \\n817: \\thostname, err := os.Hostname()\\n818: \\tif err != nil {\\n819: \\t\\treturn status, fmt.Errorf(\\\"error getting hostname: %w\\\", err)\\n820: \\t}\\n821: \\tstatus.Hostname = hostname\\n822: \\tstatus.ServerTime = time.Now().UTC()\\n823: \\n824: \\tif h.options.TSDBRetentionDuration != 0 {\\n825: \\t\\tstatus.StorageRetention = h.options.TSDBRetentionDuration.String()\\n826: \\t}\\n827: \\tif h.options.TSDBMaxBytes != 0 {\\n828: \\t\\tif status.StorageRetention != \\\"\\\" {\\n829: \\t\\t\\tstatus.StorageRetention += \\\" or \\\"\\n830: \\t\\t}\\n831: \\t\\tstatus.StorageRetention += h.options.TSDBMaxBytes.String()\\n832: \\t}\\n833: \\n834: \\tmetrics, err := h.gatherer.Gather()\\n835: \\tif err != nil {\\n836: \\t\\treturn status, fmt.Errorf(\\\"error gathering runtime status: %w\\\", err)\\n837: \\t}\\n838: \\tfor _, mF := range metrics {\\n839: \\t\\tswitch *mF.Name {\\n840: \\t\\tcase \\\"prometheus_tsdb_wal_corruptions_total\\\":\\n841: \\t\\t\\tstatus.CorruptionCount = int64(toFloat64(mF))\\n842: \\t\\tcase \\\"prometheus_config_last_reload_successful\\\":\\n843: \\t\\t\\tstatus.ReloadConfigSuccess = toFloat64(mF) != 0\\n844: \\t\\tcase \\\"prometheus_config_last_reload_success_timestamp_seconds\\\":\\n845: \\t\\t\\tstatus.LastConfigTime = time.Unix(int64(toFloat64(mF)), 0).UTC()\\n846: \\t\\t}\\n847: \\t}\\n848: \\treturn status, nil\\n849: }\\n850: \\n851: func toFloat64(f *io_prometheus_client.MetricFamily) float64 {\\n852: \\tm := f.Metric[0]\\n853: \\tif m.Gauge != nil {\\n854: \\t\\treturn m.Gauge.GetValue()\\n855: \\t}\\n856: \\tif m.Counter != nil {\\n857: \\t\\treturn m.Counter.GetValue()\\n858: \\t}\\n859: \\tif m.Untyped != nil {\\n860: \\t\\treturn m.Untyped.GetValue()\\n861: \\t}\\n862: \\treturn math.NaN()\\n863: }\\n864: \\n865: func (h *Handler) version(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {\\n866: \\tdec := json.NewEncoder(w)\\n867: \\tif err := dec.Encode(h.versionInfo); err != nil {\\n868: \\t\\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\\\"error encoding JSON: %s\\\", err), http.StatusInternalServerError)\\n869: \\t}\\n870: }\\n871: \\n872: func (h *Handler) quit(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {\\n873: \\tvar closed bool\\n874: \\th.quitOnce.Do(func() {\\n875: \\t\\tclosed = true\\n876: \\t\\tclose(h.quitCh)\\n877: \\t\\tfmt.Fprintf(w, \\\"Requesting termination... Goodbye!\\\")\\n878: \\t})\\n879: \\tif !closed {\\n880: \\t\\tfmt.Fprintf(w, \\\"Termination already in progress.\\\")\\n881: \\t}\\n882: }\\n883: \\n884: func (h *Handler) reload(w http.ResponseWriter, _ *http.Request) {\\n885: \\trc := make(chan error)\\n886: \\th.reloadCh <- rc\\n887: \\tif err := <-rc; err != nil {\\n888: \\t\\thttp.Error(w, fmt.Sprintf(\\\"failed to reload config: %s\\\", err), http.StatusInternalServerError)\\n889: \\t}\\n890: }\\n891: \\n892: func (h *Handler) consolesPath() string {\\n893: \\tif _, err := os.Stat(h.options.ConsoleTemplatesPath + \\\"/index.html\\\"); !os.IsNotExist(err) {\\n894: \\t\\treturn h.options.ExternalURL.Path + \\\"/consoles/index.html\\\"\\n895: \\t}\\n896: \\tif h.options.UserAssetsPath != \\\"\\\" {\\n897: \\t\\tif _, err := os.Stat(h.options.UserAssetsPath + \\\"/index.html\\\"); !os.IsNotExist(err) {\\n898: \\t\\t\\treturn h.options.ExternalURL.Path + \\\"/user/index.html\\\"\\n899: \\t\\t}\\n900: \\t}\\n901: \\treturn \\\"\\\"\\n902: }\\n903: \\n904: func setPathWithPrefix(prefix string) func(handlerName string, handler http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\\n905: \\treturn func(_ string, handler http.HandlerFunc) http.HandlerFunc {\\n906: \\t\\treturn func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {\\n907: \\t\\t\\thandler(w, r.WithContext(httputil.ContextWithPath(r.Context(), prefix+r.URL.Path)))\\n908: \\t\\t}\\n909: \\t}\\n910: }\\n911: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4@ba16cf5a7437eb3b6b71b74557b7a67e1975ad0f/-/blob/web/web.go\"}"

TestMain(m *testing.M) {\\n46: \\t// On linux with a global proxy the tests will fail as the go client(http,grpc) tries to connect through the proxy.\\n47: \\tos.Setenv(\\\"no_proxy\\\", \\\"localhost,127.0.0.1,0.0.0.0,:\\\")\\n48: \\tos.Exit(m.Run())\\n49: }\\n50: \\n51: type dbAdapter struct {\\n52: \\t*tsdb.DB\\n53: }\\n54: \\n55: func (a *dbAdapter) BlockMetas() ([]tsdb.BlockMeta, error) {\\n56: \\treturn a.DB.BlockMetas(), nil\\n57: }\\n58: \\n59: func (a *dbAdapter) Stats(statsByLabelName string, limit int) (*tsdb.Stats, error) {\\n60: \\treturn a.Head().Stats(statsByLabelName, limit), nil\\n61: }\\n62: \\n63: func (*dbAdapter) WALReplayStatus() (tsdb.WALReplayStatus, error) {\\n64: \\treturn tsdb.WALReplayStatus{}, nil\\n65: }\\n66: \\n67: func TestReadyAndHealthy(t *testing.T) {\\n68: \\tt.Parallel()\\n69: \\n70: \\tdbDir := t.TempDir()\\n71: \\n72: \\tdb, err := tsdb.Open(dbDir, nil, nil, nil, nil)\\n73: \\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n74: \\tt.Cleanup(func() {\\n75: \\t\\trequire.NoError(t, db.Close())\\n76: \\t})\\n77: \\tport := fmt.Sprintf(\\\":%d\\\", testutil.RandomUnprivilegedPort(t))\\n78: \\n79: \\topts := &Options{\\n80: \\t\\tListenAddresses: []string{port},\\n81: \\t\\tReadTimeout:     30 * time.Second,\\n82: \\t\\tMaxConnections:  512,\\n83: \\t\\tContext:         nil,\\n84: \\t\\tStorage: \\\"http\\\",\\n95: \\t\\t\\tHost:   \\\"localhost\\\" + port,\\n96: \\t\\t\\tPath:   \\\"/\\\",\\n97: \\t\\t},\\n98: \\t\\tVersion:  &PrometheusVersion{},\\n99: \\t\\tGatherer: prometheus.DefaultGatherer,\\n100: \\t}\\n101: \\n102: \\topts.Flags = map[string]string{}\\n103: \\n104: \\twebHandler := New(nil, opts)\\n105: \\n106: \\twebHandler.config = &config.Config{}\\n107: \\t}\\n112: \\n113: \\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\\n114: \\tdefer cancel()\\n115: \\tgo func() {\\n116: \\t\\terr := webHandler.Run(ctx, l, \\\"\\\")\\n117: \\t\\tif err server\\n123: \\t// to be up before starting tests.\\n124: \\ttime.Sleep(5 * time.Second)\\n125: \\n126: \\tbaseURL := \\\"http://localhost\\\" + port\\n127: \\n128: \\tresp, err := http.Get(baseURL + \\t\\tcode        int\\n295: \\t}{\\n296: \\t\\t{\\\"/\\\", \\\"/debug/pprof/cmdline\\\", 200},\\n297: \\t\\t{\\\"/foo\\\", \\\"/foo/debug/pprof/cmdline\\\", 200},\\n298: \\n299: \\t\\t{\\\"/\\\", \\t\\tListenAddresses: []string{\\\"somehost:9090\\\"},\\n333: \\t\\tExternalURL: &url.URL{\\n334: \\t\\t\\tHost:   \\\"localhost.localdomain:9090\\\",\\n335: \\t\\t\\tScheme: \\\"http\\\",\\n336: \\t\\t},\\n337: \\t})\\n338: \\tgetReady := func() int {\\n339: \\t\\tt.Helper()\\n340: \\t\\tw := httptest.NewRecorder()\\n341: \\n342: \\t\\treq, err := http.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, \\\"/-/ready\\\", nil)\\n343: \\t\\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n344: \\n345: \\t\\thandler.router.ServeHTTP(w, req)\\n346: \\t\\treturn w.Code\\n347: \\t}\\n348: \\n349: \\tcode := getReady()\\n350: \\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusServiceUnavailable, code)\\n351: \\tready := handler.metrics.readyStatus\\n352: \\trequire.Equal(t, 0, int(prom_testutil.ToFloat64(ready)))\\n353: \\tcounter := handler.metrics.requestCounter\\n354: \\trequire.Equal(t, 1, int(prom_testutil.ToFloat64(counter.WithLabelValues(\\\"/-/ready\\\", strconv.Itoa(http.StatusServiceUnavailable)))))\\n355: \\n356: \\thandler.SetReady(Ready)\\n357: \\tfor range [2]int{} {\\n358: \\t\\tcode = getReady()\\n359: \\t\\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, code)\\n360: \\t}\\n361: \\trequire.Equal(t, 1, int(prom_testutil.ToFloat64(ready)))\\n362: \\trequire.Equal(t, 2, int(prom_testutil.ToFloat64(counter.WithLabelValues(\\\"/-/ready\\\", strconv.Itoa(http.StatusOK)))))\\n363: \\trequire.Equal(t, 1, int(prom_testutil.ToFloat64(counter.WithLabelValues(\\\"/-/ready\\\", strconv.Itoa(http.StatusServiceUnavailable)))))\\n364: \\n365: \\thandler.SetReady(NotReady)\\n366: \\tfor range [2]int{} {\\n367: \\t\\tcode = getReady()\\n368: \\t\\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusServiceUnavailable, code)\\n369: \\t}\\n370: \\trequire.Equal(t, 0, int(prom_testutil.ToFloat64(ready)))\\n371: \\trequire.Equal(t, 2, int(prom_testutil.ToFloat64(counter.WithLabelValues(\\\"/-/ready\\\", strconv.Itoa(http.StatusOK)))))\\n372: \\trequire.Equal(t, 3, int(prom_testutil.ToFloat64(counter.WithLabelValues(\\\"/-/ready\\\", strconv.Itoa(http.StatusServiceUnavailable)))))\\n373: }\\n374: \\n375: func TestShutdownWithStaleConnection(t *testing.T) \\t\\tListenAddresses: []string{port},\\n389: \\t\\tReadTimeout:     timeout,\\n390: \\t\\tMaxConnections:  512,\\n391: \\t\\tContext:         nil,\\n392: \\t\\tStorage:         nil,\\n393: \\topts.Flags = map[string]string{}\\n410: \\n411: \\twebHandler := New(nil, opts)\\n412: \\n413: \\twebHandler.config = &config.Config{}\\n414: \\twebHandler.notifier = &notifier.Manager{}\\n415: \\tl, err := webHandler.Listeners()\\n416: \\tif err != nil {\\n417: \\t\\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\\\"Unable to start web listeners: %s\\\", err))\\n418: \\t}\\n419: \\n420: \\tclosed := make(chan struct{})\\n421: \\n422: \\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\\n423: \\tgo func() {\\n424: \\t\\terr := webHandler.Run(ctx, l, \\\"\\\")\\n425: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n426: \\t\\t\\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\\\"Can't start web handler:%s\\\", err))\\n427: \\t\\t}\\n428: \\t\\tclose(closed)\\n429: \\t}()\\n430: \\n431: \\t// Give some time for the web goroutine to run since we need the server\\n432: \\t// to be up before starting tests.\\n433: \\ttime.Sleep(5 * time.Second)\\n434: \\n435: \\t// Open a socket, and don't use it. This connection should then be closed\\n436: \\t// after the ReadTimeout.\\n437: \\tc, err := net.Dial(\\\"tcp\\\", opts.ExternalURL.Host)\\n438: \\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n439: \\tt.Cleanup(func() { require.NoError(t, c.Close()) })\\n440: \\n441: \\t// Stop the web handler.\\n442: \\tcancel()\\n443: \\n444: \\tselect {\\n445: \\tcase <-closed:\\n446: \\tcase <-time.After(timeout + 5*time.Second):\\n447: \\t\\trequire.FailNow(t, \\\"Server still running after read timeout.\\\")\\n448: \\t}\\n449: }\\n450: \\n451: func TestHandleMultipleQuitRequests(t *testing.T) {\\n452: \\tport := fmt.Sprintf(\\\":%d\\\", testutil.RandomUnprivilegedPort(t))\\n453: \\n454: \\topts := &Options{\\n455: \\t\\tListenAddresses: []string{port},\\n456: \\t\\tMaxConnections:  512,\\n457: \\t\\tEnableLifecycle: true,\\n458: \\t\\tRoutePrefix:     \\\"/\\\",\\n459: \\t\\tExternalURL: &url.URL{\\n460: \\t\\t\\tScheme: \\\"http\\\",\\n461: \\t\\t\\tHost:   \\\"localhost\\\" + port,\\n462: \\tl, err := webHandler.Listeners()\\n469: \\tif err != nil {\\n470: \\t\\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\\\"Unable to start web listeners: %s\\\", err))\\n471: \\t}\\n472: \\tctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())\\n473: \\tclosed := make(chan struct{})\\n474: \\tgo func() {\\n475: \\t\\terr := webHandler.Run(ctx, l, \\\"\\\")\\n476: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n477: \\t\\t\\tpanic(fmt.Sprintf(\\\"Can't start web handler:%s\\\", err))\\n478: \\t\\t}\\n479: \\t\\tclose(closed)\\n480: \\t}()\\n481: \\n482: \\t// Give some time for the web goroutine to run since we need the server\\n483: \\t// to be up before starting tests.\\n484: \\ttime.Sleep(5 * time.Second)\\n485: \\n486: \\tbaseURL := opts.ExternalURL.Scheme + \\\"://\\\" + opts.ExternalURL.Host\\n487: \\n488: \\tstart := make(chan struct{})\\n489: \\tvar wg sync.WaitGroup\\n490: \\tfor range 3 {\\n491: \\t\\twg.Add(1)\\n492: \\t\\tgo func() {\\n493: \\t\\t\\tdefer wg.Done()\\n494: \\t\\t\\t<-start\\n495: \\t\\t\\tresp, err := http.Post(baseURL+\\\"/-/quit\\\", \\\"\\\", strings.NewReader(\\\"\\\"))\\n496: \\t\\t\\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n497: \\t\\t\\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, resp.StatusCode)\\n498: \\t\\t}()\\n499: \\t}\\n500: \\tclose(start)\\n501: \\twg.Wait()\\n502: \\n503: \\t// Stop the web handler.\\n504: \\tcancel()\\n505: \\n506: \\tselect {\\n507: \\tcase <-closed:\\n508: \\tcase <-time.After(5 * time.Second):\\n509: \\t\\trequire.FailNow(t, \\\"Server still running after 5 seconds.\\\")\\n510: \\t}\\n511: }\\n512: \\n513: // Test for prometheus.DefaultGatherer,\\n538: \\t\\tIsAgent:  true,\\n539: \\t}\\n540: \\n541: \\topts.Flags = map[string]string{}\\n542: \\n543: \\twebHandler := New(nil, opts)\\n544: \\twebHandler.SetReady(Ready)\\n545: \\twebHandler.config = &config.Config{}\\n546: \\twebHandler.notifier = &notifier.Manager{}\\n547: \\tl, err := webHandler.Listeners()\\n548: \\tif err != nil http.MethodPost},\\n573: \\t\\t\\\"/query_range\\\":                 {http.MethodGet, http.MethodPost},\\n574: \\t\\t\\\"/query_exemplars\\\":             {http.MethodGet, http.MethodPost},\\n575: \\t\\t\\\"/admin/tsdb/clean_tombstones\\\": {http.MethodPost, http.MethodPut},\\n581: \\t\\t\\\"/admin/tsdb/snapshot\\\":         {http.MethodPost, http.MethodPut},\\n582: \\t} {\\n583: \\t\\tfor _, m := range methods {\\n584: \\t\\t\\treq, err := http.NewRequest(m, baseURL+path, nil)\\n585: \\t\\t\\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n586: \\t\\t\\tresp, err := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)\\n587: \\t\\t\\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n588: \\t\\t\\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusUnprocessableEntity, resp.StatusCode)\\n589: \\t\\t\\tt.Cleanup(func() {\\n590: \\t\\t\\t\\trequire.NoError(t, resp.Body.Close())\\n591: \\t\\t\\t})\\n592: \\t\\t}\\n593: \\t}\\n594: \\n595: \\t// Test for some of available endpoints in the Agent mode.\\n596: \\tfor path, methods := range map[string][]string{\\n597: \\t\\t\\\"/targets\\\":            {http.MethodGet},\\n598: \\t\\t\\\"/targets/metadata\\\":   {http.MethodGet},\\n599: \\t\\t\\\"/metadata\\\": err := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)\\n608: \\t\\t\\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n609: \\t\\t\\trequire.Equal(t, http.StatusOK, resp.StatusCode)\\n610: \\t\\t\\tt.Cleanup(func() {\\n611: := io.Copy(io.Discard, resp.Body)\\n619: \\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n620: \\trequire.NoError(t, resp.Body.Close())\\n621: }\\n622: \\n623: func cleanupSnapshot(t *testing.T, dbDir string, resp io.ReadAll(resp.Body)\\n630: \\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n631: \\trequire.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal(b, snapshot))\\n632: \\trequire.NotEmpty(t, snapshot.Data.Name, \\\"snapshot directory not returned\\\")\\n633: \\trequire.NoError(t, os.Remove(filepath.Join(dbDir, \\\"snapshots\\\", snapshot.Data.Name)))\\n634: \\trequire.NoError(t, os.Remove(filepath.Join(dbDir, \\t\\\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/teststorage\\\"\\n46: \\t\\\"github.com/prometheus/prometheus/util/testutil\\\"\\n47: )\\n48: \\n49: var (\\n50: \\tpatSpace       = regexp.MustCompile(\\\"[\\\\t ]+\\\")\\n51: \\tpatLoad        = regexp.MustCompile(`^load(?:_(with_nhcb))?\\\\s+(.+?)$`)\\n52: \\tpatEvalInstant = regexp.MustCompile(`^eval(?:_(fail|warn|ordered|info))?\\\\s+instant\\\\s+(?:at\\\\s+(.+?))?\\\\s+(.+)$`)\\n53: \\tpatEvalRange   = regexp.MustCompile(`^eval(?:_(fail|warn|info))?\\\\s+range\\\\s+from\\\\s+(.+)\\\\s+to\\\\s+(.+)\\\\s+step\\\\s+(.+?)\\\\s+(.+)$`)\\n54: \\tpatExpect      = regexp.MustCompile(`^expect\\\\s+(ordered|fail|warn|no_warn|info|no_info)(?:\\\\s+(regex|msg):(.+))?$`)\\n55: \\tpatMatchAny    = regexp.MustCompile(`^.*$`)\\n56: )\\n57: \\n58: const (\\n59: \\tdefaultEpsilon            = 0.000001 // Relative error allowed for sample values.\\n60: \\tDefaultMaxSamplesPerQuery = 10000\\n61: )\\n62: \\n63: type TBRun interface {\\n64: \\ttesting.TB\\n65: \\tRun(string, func(*testing.T)) bool\\n66: }\\n67: \\n68: var testStartTime = time.Unix(0, 0).UTC()\\n69: \\n70: // LoadedStorage returns storage with generated data using the provided load statements.\\n71: // Non-load statements will cause test errors.\\n72: func LoadedStorage(t testutil.T, input string) *teststorage.TestStorage {\\n73: \\ttest, err := newTest(t, input, false, newTestStorage)\\n74: \\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n75: \\n76: \\tfor _, cmd := range test.cmds {\\n77: \\t\\tswitch cmd.(type) {\\n78: \\t\\tcase *loadCmd:\\n79: \\t\\t\\trequire.NoError(t, test.exec(cmd, nil))\\n80: \\t\\tdefault:\\n81: \\t\\t\\tt.Errorf(\\\"only 'load' commands accepted, got '%s'\\\", cmd)\\n82: \\t\\t}\\n83: \\t}\\n84: \\treturn test.storage.(*teststorage.TestStorage)\\n85: }\\n86: \\n87: // NewTestEngine creates a promql.Engine with enablePerStepStats, lookbackDelta and maxSamples, and returns it.\\n88: func NewTestEngine(tb testing.TB, enablePerStepStats bool, lookbackDelta time.Duration, maxSamples int) *promql.Engine {\\n89: \\treturn NewTestEngineWithOpts(tb, promql.EngineOpts{\\n90: \\t\\tLogger:                   nil,\\n91: \\t\\tReg:                      nil,\\n92: \\t\\tMaxSamples:               maxSamples,\\n93: \\t\\tTimeout:                  100 * time.Second,\\n94: \\t\\tNoStepSubqueryIntervalFn: func(int64) int64 { return durationMilliseconds(1 * time.Minute) },\\n95: \\t\\tEnableAtModifier:         true,\\n96: \\t\\tEnableNegativeOffset:     true,\\n97: \\t\\tEnablePerStepStats:       enablePerStepStats,\\n98: \\t\\tLookbackDelta:            lookbackDelta,\\n99: \\t\\tEnableDelayedNameRemoval: true,\\n100: \\t})\\n101: }\\n102: \\n103: // NewTestEngineWithOpts creates a promql.Engine with opts and returns it.\\n104: func NewTestEngineWithOpts(tb testing.TB, opts promql.EngineOpts) *promql.Engine {\\n105: \\ttb.Helper()\\n106: \\tng := promql.NewEngine(opts)\\n107: \\ttb.Cleanup(func() {\\n108: \\t\\trequire.NoError(tb, ng.Close())\\n109: \\t})\\n110: \\treturn ng\\n111: }\\n112: \\n113: // RunBuiltinTests runs an acceptance test suite against the provided engine.\\n114: func RunBuiltinTests(t TBRun, engine promql.QueryEngine) {\\n115: \\tRunBuiltinTestsWithStorage(t, engine, newTestStorage)\\n116: }\\n117: \\n118: // RunBuiltinTestsWithStorage runs an acceptance test suite against the provided engine and storage.\\n119: func RunBuiltinTestsWithStorage(t TBRun, engine promql.QueryEngine, newStorage func(testutil.T) storage.Storage) {\\n120: \\tt.Cleanup(func() {\\n121: \\t\\tparser.EnableExperimentalFunctions = false\\n122: \\t\\tparser.ExperimentalDurationExpr = false\\n123: \\t})\\n124: \\tparser.EnableExperimentalFunctions = true\\n125: \\tparser.ExperimentalDurationExpr = true\\n126: \\n127: \\tfiles, err := fs.Glob(testsFs, \\\"*/*.test\\\")\\n128: \\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n129: \\n130: \\tfor _, fn := range files {\\n131: \\t\\tt.Run(fn, func(t *testing.T) {\\n132: \\t\\t\\tcontent, err := fs.ReadFile(testsFs, fn)\\n133: \\t\\t\\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n134: \\t\\t\\tRunTestWithStorage(t, string(content), engine, newStorage)\\n135: \\t\\t})\\n136: \\t}\\n137: }\\n138: \\n139: // RunTest parses and runs the test against the provided engine.\\n140: func RunTest(t testutil.T, input string, engine promql.QueryEngine) {\\n141: \\tRunTestWithStorage(t, input, engine, newTestStorage)\\n142: }\\n143: \\n144: // RunTestWithStorage parses and runs the test against the provided engine and storage.\\n145: func RunTestWithStorage(t testutil.T, input string, engine promql.QueryEngine, newStorage func(testutil.T) storage.Storage) {\\n146: \\trequire.NoError(t, runTest(t, input, engine, newStorage, false))\\n147: }\\n148: \\n149: // testTest allows tests to be run in \\\"test-the-test\\\" mode (true for\\n150: // testingMode). This is a special mode for testing test code execution itself.\\n151: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4@ba16cf5a7437eb3b6b71b74557b7a67e1975ad0f/-/blob/promql/promqltest/test.go%3FL1-150\"}"

  "command": "cat > /tmp/refactor.sh << 'EOF'\n#!/bin/bash\n\n# This script will help us track the refactoring\n# We'll use sed to make the replacements\n\ndeclare -A files_to_modify=(\n    [\"promql/engine.go\"]=\"117:121\"\n    [\"promql/promqltest/test.go\"]=\"114,119,140,145\"\n    [\"web/api/v1/api.go\"]=\"222,259\"\n    [\"rules/manager.go\"]=\"49\"\n)\n\necho \"Files to modify:\"\nfor file in \"${!files_to_modify[@]}\"; do\n    echo \"  - $file (lines: ${files_to_modify[$file]})\"\ndone\nEOF\nchmod +x /tmp/refactor.sh\n/tmp/refactor.sh\n",
  "description": "Create refactoring plan script"
}

  "description": "Check if we can fetch files directly"
}
