Output
{
  "content": "{\"content\":\"113: // RunBuiltinTests runs an acceptance test suite against the provided engine.\\n114: func RunBuiltinTests(t TBRun, engine promql.QueryEngine) {\\n115: \\tRunBuiltinTestsWithStorage(t, engine, newTestStorage)\\n116: }\\n117: \\n118: // RunBuiltinTestsWithStorage runs an acceptance test suite against the provided engine and storage.\\n119: func RunBuiltinTestsWithStorage(t TBRun, engine promql.QueryEngine, newStorage func(testutil.T) storage.Storage) {\\n120: \\tt.Cleanup(func() {\\n121: \\t\\tparser.EnableExperimentalFunctions = false\\n122: \\t\\tparser.ExperimentalDurationExpr = false\\n123: \\t})\\n124: \\tparser.EnableExperimentalFunctions = true\\n125: \\tparser.ExperimentalDurationExpr = true\\n126: \\n127: \\tfiles, err := fs.Glob(testsFs, \\\"*/*.test\\\")\\n128: \\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n129: \\n130: \\tfor _, fn := range files {\\n131: \\t\\tt.Run(fn, func(t *testing.T) {\\n132: \\t\\t\\tcontent, err := fs.ReadFile(testsFs, fn)\\n133: \\t\\t\\trequire.NoError(t, err)\\n134: \\t\\t\\tRunTestWithStorage(t, string(content), engine, newStorage)\\n135: \\t\\t})\\n136: \\t}\\n137: }\\n138: \\n139: // RunTest parses and runs the test against the provided engine.\\n140: func RunTest(t testutil.T, input string, engine promql.QueryEngine) {\\n141: \\tRunTestWithStorage(t, input, engine, newTestStorage)\\n142: }\\n143: \\n144: // RunTestWithStorage parses and runs the test against the provided engine and storage.\\n145: func RunTestWithStorage(t testutil.T, input string, engine promql.QueryEngine, newStorage func(testutil.T) storage.Storage) {\\n146: \\trequire.NoError(t, runTest(t, input, engine, newStorage, false))\\n147: }\\n148: \\n149: // testTest allows tests to be run in \\\"test-the-test\\\" mode (true for\\n150: // testingMode). This is a special mode for testing test code execution itself.\\n151: func testTest(t testutil.T, input string, engine promql.QueryEngine) error {\\n152: \\treturn runTest(t, input, engine, newTestStorage, true)\\n153: }\\n154: \\n155: func runTest(t testutil.T, input string, engine promql.QueryEngine, newStorage func(testutil.T) storage.Storage, testingMode bool) error {\\n156: \\ttest, err := newTest(t, input, testingMode, newStorage)\\n157: \\n158: \\t// Why do this before checking err? newTest() can create the test storage and then return an error,\\n159: \\t// and we want to make sure to clean that up to avoid leaking goroutines.\\n160: \\tdefer func() {\\n161: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4@ba16cf5a7437eb3b6b71b74557b7a67e1975ad0f/-/blob/promql/promqltest/test.go%3FL113-160\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "113: // RunBuiltinTests runs an acceptance test suite against the provided engine.\n114: func RunBuiltinTests(t TBRun, engine promql.QueryEngine) {\n115: \tRunBuiltinTestsWithStorage(t, engine, newTestStorage)\n116: }\n117: \n118: // RunBuiltinTestsWithStorage runs an acceptance test suite against the provided engine and storage.\n119: func RunBuiltinTestsWithStorage(t TBRun, engine promql.QueryEngine, newStorage func(testutil.T) storage.Storage) {\n120: \tt.Cleanup(func() {\n121: \t\tparser.EnableExperimentalFunctions = false\n122: \t\tparser.ExperimentalDurationExpr = false\n123: \t})\n124: \tparser.EnableExperimentalFunctions = true\n125: \tparser.ExperimentalDurationExpr = true\n126: \n127: \tfiles, err := fs.Glob(testsFs, \"*/*.test\")\n128: \trequire.NoError(t, err)\n129: \n130: \tfor _, fn := range files {\n131: \t\tt.Run(fn, func(t *testing.T) {\n132: \t\t\tcontent, err := fs.ReadFile(testsFs, fn)\n133: \t\t\trequire.NoError(t, err)\n134: \t\t\tRunTestWithStorage(t, string(content), engine, newStorage)\n135: \t\t})\n136: \t}\n137: }\n138: \n139: // RunTest parses and runs the test against the provided engine.\n140: func RunTest(t testutil.T, input string, engine promql.QueryEngine) {\n141: \tRunTestWithStorage(t, input, engine, newTestStorage)\n142: }\n143: \n144: // RunTestWithStorage parses and runs the test against the provided engine and storage.\n145: func RunTestWithStorage(t testutil.T, input string, engine promql.QueryEngine, newStorage func(testutil.T) storage.Storage) {\n146: \trequire.NoError(t, runTest(t, input, engine, newStorage, false))\n147: }\n148: \n149: // testTest allows tests to be run in \"test-the-test\" mode (true for\n150: // testingMode). This is a special mode for testing test code execution itself.\n151: func testTest(t testutil.T, input string, engine promql.QueryEngine) error {\n152: \treturn runTest(t, input, engine, newTestStorage, true)\n153: }\n154: \n155: func runTest(t testutil.T, input string, engine promql.QueryEngine, newStorage func(testutil.T) storage.Storage, testingMode bool) error {\n156: \ttest, err := newTest(t, input, testingMode, newStorage)\n157: \n158: \t// Why do this before checking err? newTest() can create the test storage and then return an error,\n159: \t// and we want to make sure to clean that up to avoid leaking goroutines.\n160: \tdefer func() {\n161: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4@ba16cf5a7437eb3b6b71b74557b7a67e1975ad0f/-/blob/promql/promqltest/test.go%3FL113-160"
  }
}

2. WRITE /workspace/MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md
# Refactoring Summary: QueryEngine → PromQLEvaluator

## Overview
This refactoring renames the `QueryEngine` interface to `PromQLEvaluator` throughout the Prometheus codebase. The interface definition changes from generic "QueryEngine" to more specific "PromQLEvaluator" to better represent its evaluation functionality.

## Files to Modify

### 1. promql/engine.go (4014 lines)
**Location:** `/workspace/promql_engine.go`

**Changes at lines 117-121:**
```go
// OLD:
// QueryEngine defines the interface for the *promql.Engine, so it can be replaced, wrapped or mocked.
type QueryEngine interface {
    NewInstantQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, ts time.Time) (Query, error)
    NewRangeQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, start, end time.Time, interval time.Duration) (Query, error)
}

// NEW:
// PromQLEvaluator defines the interface for the *promql.Engine, so it can be replaced, wrapped or mocked.
type PromQLEvaluator interface {
    NewInstantQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, ts time.Time) (Query, error)
    NewRangeQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, start, end time.Time, interval time.Duration) (Query, error)
}
```

**Replacements throughout file:**
- `type QueryEngine interface` → `type PromQLEvaluator interface`
- `promql.QueryEngine` → `promql.PromQLEvaluator`
- `engine promql.QueryEngine` → `engine promql.PromQLEvaluator`
- `qe promql.QueryEngine` → `qe promql.PromQLEvaluator`

---

### 2. promql/promqltest/test.go
**Location:** `/workspace/promql_promqltest_test.go`

**Changes in function signatures (lines 114, 119, 140, 145, 151, 155):**

Lines 114-116:
```go
// OLD:
func RunBuiltinTests(t TBRun, engine promql.
... (truncated)
3. WRITE /workspace/IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md
# Implementation Guide: QueryEngine → PromQLEvaluator Refactoring

## Complete Instructions for Making Modifications

This guide provides step-by-step instructions for refactoring the Prometheus codebase to rename the `QueryEngine` interface to `PromQLEvaluator`.

## Pre-requisites
- Access to Sourcegraph or local repository: `github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4`
- Text editor or IDE with Find & Replace capability
- Git for version control

---

## File-by-File Modifications

### FILE 1: promql/engine.go

**Total Lines:** 4014

**Modification 1: Interface Definition (Lines 117-121)**

**Current code:**
```go
// QueryEngine defines the interface for the *promql.Engine, so it can be replaced, wrapped or mocked.
type QueryEngine interface {
	NewInstantQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, ts time.Time) (Query, error)
	NewRangeQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, start, end time.Time, interval time.Duration) (Query, error)
}
```

**Modified code:**
```go
// PromQLEvaluator defines the interface for the *promql.Engine, so it can be replaced, wrapped or mocked.
type PromQLEvaluator interface {
	NewInstantQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, ts time.Time) (Query, error)
	NewRangeQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, start, end time.Time, interval time.Duration) (Query, error)
}
```

**Global Find & Replace Operations:**

After modifying the interface definition, apply these replacements throughout the file:

1. **Replace all `promql.QueryEngine` references:**
   - Find: `promql.QueryEngine`
   - Replace: `promql.PromQLEvaluator`
   - Expected occurrences: Multiple (check each location)

2. **Replace specific parameter names:*
... (truncated)

    NewRangeQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, start, end time.Time, interval time.Duration) (Query, error)
}

// AFTER

    NewInstantQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, ts time.Time) (Query, error)
    NewRangeQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, start, end time.Time, interval time.Duration) (Query, error)
}
```

- [ ] Grep for `promql.PromQLEvaluator` (should exist in multiple places)

#!/bin/bash

# This script will help us track the refactoring
# We'll use sed to make the replacements

declare -A files_to_modify=(
    ["promql/engine.go"]="117:121"
    ["promql/promqltest/test.go"]="114,119,140,145"
    ["web/api/v1/api.go"]="222,259"
    ["rules/manager.go"]="49"
)

echo "Files to modify:"
for file in "${!files_to_modify[@]}"; do
    echo "  - $file (lines: ${files_to_modify[$file]})"
done
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/refactor.sh
/tmp/refactor.sh

#!/usr/bin/env python3
import sys

# Changes to make:
# 1. promql/engine.go line 117: Change "QueryEngine" to "PromQLEvaluator"
# 2. promql/promqltest/test.go: Update function parameters
# 3. web/api/v1/api.go: Update field and parameter
# 4. rules/manager.go: Update function parameter

changes = [
    {
        'file': 'promql/engine.go',
        'old': '// QueryEngine defines the interface for the *promql.Engine, so it can be replaced, wrapped or mocked.\ntype QueryEngine interface {',
        'new': '// PromQLEvaluator defines the interface for the *promql.Engine, so it can be replaced, wrapped or mocked.\ntype PromQLEvaluator interface {'
    },
    {
        'file': 'promql/promqltest/test.go',
        'old': 'func RunBuiltinTests(t TBRun, engine promql.QueryEngine) {',
        'new': 'func RunBuiltinTests(t TBRun, engine promql.PromQLEvaluator) {'
    },
    {
        'file': 'promql/promqltest/test.go',
        'old': 'func RunBuiltinTestsWithStorage(t TBRun, engine promql.QueryEngine, newStorage func(testutil.T) storage.Storage) {',
        'new': 'func RunBuiltinTestsWithStorage(t TBRun, engine promql.PromQLEvaluator, newStorage func(testutil.T) storage.Storage) {'
    },
    {
        'file': 'promql/promqltest/test.go',
        'old': 'func RunTest(t testutil.T, input string, engine promql.QueryEngine) {',
        'new': 'func RunTest(t testutil.T, input string, engine promql.PromQLEvaluator) {'
    },
    {
        'file': 'promql/promqltest/test.go',
        'old': 'func RunTestWithStorage(t testutil.T, input string, engine promql.QueryEngine, newStorage func(testutil.T) storage.Storage) {',
        'new': 'func RunTestWithStorage(t testutil.T, input string, engine promql.PromQLEvaluator, newStorage func(testutil.T) storage.Storage) {'
    },
    {
        'file': 'web/api/v1/api.go',
        'old': '\tQueryEngine       promql.QueryEngine',
        'new': '\tQueryEngine       promql.PromQLEvaluator'
    },
    {
        'file': 'web/api/v1/api.go',
        'old': 'func NewAPI(\n\tqe promql.QueryEngine,',
        'new': 'func NewAPI(\n\tqe promql.PromQLEvaluator,'
    },
    {
        'file': 'rules/manager.go',
        'old': 'func EngineQueryFunc(engine promql.QueryEngine, q storage.Queryable) QueryFunc {',
        'new': 'func EngineQueryFunc(engine promql.PromQLEvaluator, q storage.Queryable) QueryFunc {'
    },
]

print(f"Total changes to make: {len(changes)}")
for i, change in enumerate(changes, 1):
    print(f"{i}. {change['file']}")

PYEOF
python3 /tmp/make_changes.py

7. $ python3 << 'PYEOF'
import subprocess
import os

# Create the workspace directory structure
os.makedirs('/workspace/promql', exist_ok=True)
os.makedirs('/workspace/promql/promqltest', exist_ok=True)
os.makedirs('/workspace/web/api/v1', exist_ok=True)
os.makedirs('/workspace/rules', exist_ok=True)

# Files to download and process
files = [
    ('promql/engine.go', 'promql/engine.go'),
    ('promql/promqltest/test.go', 'promql/promqltest/test.go'),
    ('web/api/v1/api.go', 'web/api/v1/api.go'),
    ('rules/manager.go', 'rules/manager.go'),
]

base_url = 'https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4/-/raw/'

print("Downloading files...")
for src, dest in files:
    url = base_url + src
    local_path = '/workspace/' + dest
    print(f"  Downloading {src}...")
    result = subprocess.run(['curl', '-s', url, '-o', local_path], capture_output=True)
    if result.returncode == 0:
        size = os.path.getsize(local_path)
        print(f"    ✓ Downloaded {size} bytes to {local_path}")
    else:
        print(f"    ✗ Failed to download {src}")

PYEOF

11. $ cat > /tmp/create_files.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

# Create workspace files directory
mkdir -p /workspace

# Function to make replacements in a file
make_replacements() {
    local content="$1"
    local file="$2"
    
    # Make the replacements
    local modified="$content"
    modified="${modified//type QueryEngine interface/type PromQLEvaluator interface}"
    modified="${modified//promql.QueryEngine/promql.PromQLEvaluator}"
    modified="${modified//engine promql.QueryEngine/engine promql.PromQLEvaluator}"
    modified="${modified//qe promql.QueryEngine/qe promql.PromQLEvaluator}"
    
    echo "$modified" > "$file"
}

echo "Files created successfully in /workspace"
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/create_files.sh

12. $ cat > /tmp/process_files.py << 'PYTHON_EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import sys

def make_replacements(content):
    """Apply all the necessary replacements"""
    replacements = [
        ("type QueryEngine interface", "type PromQLEvaluator interface"),
        ("promql.QueryEngine", "promql.PromQLEvaluator"),
        ("engine promql.QueryEngine", "engine promql.PromQLEvaluator"),
        ("qe promql.QueryEngine", "qe promql.PromQLEvaluator"),
    ]
    
    result = content
    for old, new in replacements:
        result = result.replace(old, new)
    
    return result

# Test the function
test_content = """type QueryEngine interface {
    NewInstantQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, ts time.Time) (Query, error)
    NewRangeQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, start, end time.Time, interval time.Duration) (Query, error)
}

func EngineQueryFunc(engine promql.QueryEngine, q storage.Queryable) QueryFunc {
    return func(ctx context.Context, qs string, t time.Time) (promql.Vector, error) {
        qe, err := engine.NewInstantQuery(ctx, q, nil, qs, t)
"""

result = make_replacements(test_content)
print(result)
PYTHON_EOF

python3 /tmp/process_files.py

14. $ cat > /tmp/generate_modified_files.py << 'PYTHON_EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Generate modified versions of the files with QueryEngine -> PromQLEvaluator replacements
"""

def apply_replacements(content):
    """Apply all necessary replacements"""
    replacements = [
        ("type QueryEngine interface", "type PromQLEvaluator interface"),
        ("promql.QueryEngine", "promql.PromQLEvaluator"),
        ("engine promql.QueryEngine", "engine promql.PromQLEvaluator"),
        ("qe promql.QueryEngine", "qe promql.PromQLEvaluator"),
    ]
    
    result = content
    for old, new in replacements:
        count = result.count(old)
        if count > 0:
            print(f"Replacing '{old}' with '{new}' ({count} occurrences)")
        result = result.replace(old, new)
    
    return result

# Test files content (simplified examples)

# File 1: engine.go snippet
engine_go_snippet = """// QueryEngine defines the interface for the *promql.Engine, so it can be replaced, wrapped or mocked.
type QueryEngine interface {
	NewInstantQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, ts time.Time) (Query, error)
	NewRangeQuery(ctx context.Context, q storage.Queryable, opts QueryOpts, qs string, start, end time.Time, interval time.Duration) (Query, error)
}

var _ QueryLogger = (*logging.JSONFileLogger)(nil)

// QueryLogger is an interface that can be used to log all the queries logged
// by the engine.
type QueryLogger interface {
	slog.Handler
	io.Closer
}"""

# File 2: promqltest/test.go snippet
test_go_snippet = """// RunBuiltinTests runs an acceptance test suite against the provided engine.
func RunBuiltinTests(t TBRun, engine promql.QueryEngine) {
	RunBuiltinTestsWithStorage(t, engine, newTestStorage)
}

// RunBuiltinTestsWithStorage runs an acceptance test suite against the provided engine and storage.
func RunBuiltinTestsWithStorage(t TBRun, engine promql.QueryEngine, newStorage func(testutil.T) storage.Storage) {"""

# File 3: api.go snippet
api_go_snippet = """// API can register a set of endpoints in a router and handle
// them using the provided storage and query engine.
type API struct {
	QueryEngine       promql.QueryEngine
	ExemplarQueryable storage.ExemplarQueryable
}

// NewAPI returns an initialized API type.
func NewAPI(
	qe promql.QueryEngine,
	q storage.SampleAndChunkQueryable,"""

# File 4: manager.go snippet
manager_go_snippet = """// EngineQueryFunc returns a new query function that executes instant queries against
// the given engine.
// It converts scalar into vector results.
func EngineQueryFunc(engine promql.QueryEngine, q storage.Queryable) QueryFunc {"""

# Apply replacements and show results
print("=" * 60)
print("File 1: engine.go")
print("=" * 60)
result1 = apply_replacements(engine_go_snippet)
print("\nResult:")
print(result1)

print("\n" + "=" * 60)
print("File 2: promqltest/test.go")
print("=" * 60)
result2 = apply_replacements(test_go_snippet)
print("\nResult:")
print(result2)

print("\n" + "=" * 60)
print("File 3: api.go")
print("=" * 60)
result3 = apply_replacements(api_go_snippet)
print("\nResult:")
print(result3)

print("\n" + "=" * 60)
print("File 4: manager.go")
print("=" * 60)
result4 = apply_replacements(manager_go_snippet)
print("\nResult:")
print(result4)
PYTHON_EOF

python3 /tmp/generate_modified_files.py

15. $ cat > /workspace/README.md << 'EOF'
# Prometheus QueryEngine → PromQLEvaluator Refactoring

## Overview

This directory contains comprehensive documentation and guides for refactoring the Prometheus codebase to rename the `QueryEngine` interface to `PromQLEvaluator`.

**Repository:** github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4

### What's Being Changed?

The `QueryEngine` interface, which defines the contract for PromQL query execution, is being renamed to `PromQLEvaluator` to better represent its actual purpose: evaluating PromQL expressions.

**Old Interface Name:** `QueryEngine`
**New Interface Name:** `PromQLEvaluator`

---

## Files in This Directory

### 1. **MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md**
   - Complete overview of all changes needed
   - Interface definition comparison
   - Replacement patterns summary
   - Verification checklist

### 2. **IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md**
   - Step-by-step instructions for each file
   - Before/after code examples
   - Batch find & replace strategy
   - Verification steps
   - Rollback instructions

### 3. **REFACTORING_CHECKLIST.md**
   - Detailed checklist for all modifications
   - Line-by-line change tracking
   - Testing and verification procedures
   - Risk assessment
   - Sign-off sheet

### 4. **promql_engine.go** (Stub)
   - Template showing how engine.go should be modified
   - Example of interface rename
   - Demonstrates replacement patterns

---

## Files to Be Modified in Repository

### 1. promql/engine.go (4014 lines)
- **Primary Change:** Rename `QueryEngine` interface to `PromQLEvaluator` (lines 117-121)
- **Additional Changes:** Update all `promql.QueryEngine` references throughout

### 2. promql/promqltest/test.go
- **Changes:** Update 6 function signatures to use `promql.PromQLEvaluator`
- **Functions Affected:**
  - `RunBuiltinTests()`
  - `RunBuiltinTestsWithStorage()`
  - `RunTest()`
  - `RunTestWithStorage()`
  - `testTest()`
  - `runTest()`

### 3. web/api/v1/api.go
- **Changes:** 2 locations
  - API struct field: `QueryEngine promql.QueryEngine` → `QueryEngine promql.PromQLEvaluator`
  - NewAPI function parameter: `qe promql.QueryEngine` → `qe promql.PromQLEvaluator`

### 4. rules/manager.go
- **Changes:** 1 location
  - EngineQueryFunc parameter: `engine promql.QueryEngine` → `engine promql.PromQLEvaluator`

---

## Quick Start

### To Understand the Changes:
1. Read `MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md` for a high-level overview
2. Review specific file sections in `IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md`

### To Implement the Changes:
1. Use `REFACTORING_CHECKLIST.md` as your task list
2. Follow `IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md` for step-by-step instructions
3. Use the Find & Replace patterns provided

### To Verify Changes:
1. Follow the "Testing & Verification" section in `REFACTORING_CHECKLIST.md`
2. Ensure all 4 files compile together
3. Run the test suite: `go test ./...`

---

## Change Summary

| File | Lines | Changes | Type |
|------|-------|---------|------|
| promql/engine.go | 117-121+ | Interface rename + references | Define & Update |
| promql/promqltest/test.go | 114,119,140,145,151,155 | Function parameters | Update |
| web/api/v1/api.go | 222,259 | Struct field & function param | Update |
| rules/manager.go | 49 | Function parameter | Update |

**Total Changes:** ~15-20 replacements across 4 files

---

## Key Replacement Patterns

Execute these find & replace operations in your IDE or text editor:

```
Pattern 1: type QueryEngine interface → type PromQLEvaluator interface
Pattern 2: promql.QueryEngine → promql.PromQLEvaluator
Pattern 3: engine promql.QueryEngine → engine promql.PromQLEvaluator (optional)
Pattern 4: qe promql.QueryEngine → qe promql.PromQLEvaluator (optional)
```

---

## Testing

After making changes:

```bash
# Build the project
go build ./...

# Run tests
go test ./...

# Check for any remaining references
grep -r "QueryEngine" promql/ promql/promqltest/ web/api/v1/ rules/ --include="*.go"
```

Expected: Only comments should contain "QueryEngine"

---

## Risk Assessment

- **Risk Level:** LOW
- **Impact:** Type/interface name changes only, no behavioral changes
- **Backward Compatibility:** Function signatures change, but behavior is identical
- **Rollback:** Simple git revert if needed

---

## Additional Notes

1. **Comments:** Update comments that reference "QueryEngine" to say "PromQLEvaluator"
2. **Documentation:** Check if any docs reference the old interface name
3. **Type Safety:** Go's type system ensures all references are updated (compilation will catch any missed changes)
4. **Test Coverage:** Existing tests should pass once type names are updated

---

## Step-by-Step Workflow

### Phase 1: Preparation
- [ ] Review all documentation in this directory
- [ ] Understand scope and impact
- [ ] Prepare development environment

### Phase 2: Implementation
- [ ] Modify promql/engine.go
- [ ] Modify promql/promqltest/test.go
- [ ] Modify web/api/v1/api.go
- [ ] Modify rules/manager.go
- [ ] Verify all changes compile

### Phase 3: Verification
- [ ] Run full test suite
- [ ] Code review
- [ ] Performance testing (if needed)
- [ ] Documentation update (if needed)

### Phase 4: Commit
- [ ] Create git commit with clear message
- [ ] Include refactoring details in commit body
- [ ] Push to feature branch for review

---

## Support & Questions

For questions about:
- **What to change:** See `MODIFICATIONS_SUMMARY.md`
- **How to change:** See `IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md`
- **Tracking progress:** Use `REFACTORING_CHECKLIST.md`
- **Examples:** See code blocks in any of the guides

---

## References

- Repository: github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4
- Interface Type: promql.QueryEngine (renamed to promql.PromQLEvaluator)
- Related Code: Prometheus PromQL query execution engine

---

**Last Updated:** 2025
**Status:** Ready for Implementation
**Complexity:** Low
**Estimated Time:** 15-30 minutes
EOF
cat /workspace/README.md

EOF

20. $ cat > /tmp/refactor_files.py << 'PYEOF'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Refactor script to rename QueryEngine to PromQLEvaluator
"""

import os

# Define the files and replacements
replacements = [
    # In promql/engine.go
    {
        'pattern': '// QueryEngine defines the interface for the *promql.Engine, so it can be replaced, wrapped or mocked.\ntype QueryEngine interface {',
        'replacement': '// PromQLEvaluator defines the interface for the *promql.Engine, so it can be replaced, wrapped or mocked.\ntype PromQLEvaluator interface {',
    },
    # In various files
    {
        'pattern': 'promql.QueryEngine',
        'replacement': 'promql.PromQLEvaluator',
        'files': ['promql/engine.go', 'promql/promqltest/test.go', 'web/api/v1/api.go', 'rules/manager.go']
    },
]

print("Refactoring plan:")
print("1. Read each file from Sourcegraph (via MCP)")
print("2. Make text replacements")
print("3. Write to /workspace/")
print("\nFiles to modify:")
print("  - promql/engine.go")
print("  - promql/promqltest/test.go")
print("  - web/api/v1/api.go")
print("  - rules/manager.go")

PYEOF
python3 /tmp/refactor_files.py

21. $ git remote add origin https://github.com/sg-evals/prometheus--ba14bc4.git 2>&1 || echo "Remote might already exist"
22. $ git fetch origin master:master 2>&1 | head -20
23. $ git ls-remote origin | head -20
24. $ git fetch origin ba16cf5a7437eb3b6b71b74557b7a67e1975ad0f:fetched 2>&1 && git checkout fetched 2>&1 | head -10
25. $ ls -lh /workspace/ | head -20
26. $ rm /workspace/*.md /workspace/*.txt && rm -rf /workspace/promql /workspace/web /workspace/rules && git checkout fetched 2>&1 | head -20
27. $ ls -lh /workspace/promql/engine.go /workspace/promql/promqltest/test.go /workspace/web/api/v1/api.go /workspace/rules/manager.go
28. $ 
# Apply replacements using sed
cd /workspace

# 1. promql/engine.go - Rename interface definition and comment
sed -i 's/\/\/ QueryEngine defines the interface/\/\/ PromQLEvaluator defines the interface/' promql/engine.go
sed -i 's/^type QueryEngine interface/type PromQLEvaluator interface/' promql/engine.go

# 2. promql/promqltest/test.go - Update function parameters
sed -i 's/engine promql\.QueryEngine/engine promql.PromQLEvaluator/g' promql/promqltest/test.go

# 3. web/api/v1/api.go - Update field and function parameter
sed -i 's/QueryEngine       promql\.QueryEngine/QueryEngine       promql.PromQLEvaluator/' web/api/v1/api.go
sed -i 's/qe promql\.QueryEngine,/qe promql.PromQLEvaluator,/' web/api/v1/api.go

# 4. rules/manager.go - Update function parameter
sed -i 's/engine promql\.QueryEngine/engine promql.PromQLEvaluator/' rules/manager.go

echo "Replacements completed!"

29. $ 
echo "=== promql/engine.go interface definition ==="
grep -n "PromQLEvaluator interface" /workspace/promql/engine.go | head -3

echo ""
echo "=== promql/promqltest/test.go function signatures ==="
grep -n "promql.PromQLEvaluator" /workspace/promql/promqltest/test.go | head -6

echo ""
echo "=== web/api/v1/api.go ==="
grep -n "promql.PromQLEvaluator" /workspace/web/api/v1/api.go | head -2

echo ""
echo "=== rules/manager.go ==="
grep -n "promql.PromQLEvaluator" /workspace/rules/manager.go | head -1

30. $ 
echo "=== promql/engine.go interface definition ==="
grep -n "PromQLEvaluator interface" /workspace/promql/engine.go

echo ""
echo "=== promql/promqltest/test.go function signatures ==="
grep -n "promql.PromQLEvaluator" /workspace/promql/promqltest/test.go

echo ""
echo "=== web/api/v1/api.go ==="
grep -n "promql.PromQLEvaluator" /workspace/web/api/v1/api.go

echo ""
echo "=== rules/manager.go ==="
grep -n "promql.PromQLEvaluator" /workspace/rules/manager.go

31. $ grep -n "PromQLEvaluator defines the interface" /workspace/promql/engine.go
32. $ 
cd /workspace
# Try to build just the promql and web packages to verify syntax
go mod tidy 2>&1 | head -20

33. $

grep -n "type QueryEngine" /workspace/promql/engine.go /workspace/promql/promqltest/test.go /workspace/web/api/v1/api.go /workspace/rules/manager.go 2>/dev/null || echo "✓ None found"

echo ""
echo "=== Checking for unqualified 'QueryEngine' parameter declarations ==="
grep -n "engine QueryEngine\|qe QueryEngine" /workspace/promql/engine.go /workspace/promql/promqltest/test.go /workspace/web/api/v1/api.go /workspace/rules/manager.go 2>/dev/null || echo "✓ None found"

echo ""
echo "=== Checking for promql.QueryEngine references that should have been updated ==="
grep -n "promql\.QueryEngine" /workspace/promql/engine.go /workspace/promql/promqltest/test.go /workspace/web/api/v1/api.go /workspace/rules/manager.go 2>/dev/null || echo "✓ None found"
